Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(*****************************************************************

 Monoidal category from smash products

 We show that every notion of structure that supports a smash
 product, gives rise to a symmetric monoidal closed category. Note
 that in the construction, we give two (equivalent) definitions
 for both of the associators. One of the two definition is
 convenient for calculation, while the other is better for proving
 that it is a structure preserving map.

 Contents
 1. Tensor operation
 2. Unitors
 3. The braiding
 4. The associators
 5. The monoidal structure
 6. It is symmetric
 7. It is closed

 *****************************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.WhiskeredBifunctors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Structure.Symmetric.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Structure.Closed.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Structures.CartesianStructure.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Structures.StructureLimitsAndColimits.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Structures.StructuresSmashProduct.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinProducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Terminal.

Local Open Scope cat.

Section StructureSmashProduct.
  Context (P : hset_struct_with_smash_closed).

  Local Notation "∁" := (category_of_hset_struct P).

  (**
   1. Tensor operation
   *)
  
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
PX, PY₁, PY₂: category_of_hset_struct P
f: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ PY₁, PY₂ ⟧
category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ PX ∧* PY₁, PX ∧* PY₂ ⟧

  
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
PX, PY₁, PY₂: category_of_hset_struct P
f: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ PY₁, PY₂ ⟧
category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ PX ∧* PY₁, PX ∧* PY₂ ⟧

    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
PX, PY₁, PY₂: category_of_hset_struct P
f: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ PY₁, PY₂ ⟧
Core.hset_category ⟦ pr1 (PX ∧* PY₁), pr1 (PX ∧* PY₂)
⟧
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
PX, PY₁, PY₂: category_of_hset_struct P
f: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ PY₁, PY₂ ⟧
(λ f : Core.hset_category ⟦ pr1 (PX ∧* PY₁),
       pr1 (PX ∧* PY₂) ⟧,
 Core.mor_disp (pr2 (PX ∧* PY₁)) (pr2 (PX ∧* PY₂)) f)
  ?pr1

    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
PX, PY₁, PY₂: category_of_hset_struct P
f: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ PY₁, PY₂ ⟧
Core.hset_category ⟦ pr1 (PX ∧* PY₁), pr1 (PX ∧* PY₂)
⟧
 
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
PX, PY₁, PY₂: category_of_hset_struct P
f: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ PY₁, PY₂ ⟧
pr1 PX → pr1 PY₁ → pr1 (PX ∧* PY₂)
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
PX, PY₁, PY₂: category_of_hset_struct P
f: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ PY₁, PY₂ ⟧
∏ y₁ y₂ : pr1 PY₁,
?h (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 PX)) y₁ =
?h (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 PX)) y₂
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
PX, PY₁, PY₂: category_of_hset_struct P
f: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ PY₁, PY₂ ⟧
∏ (x : pr1 PX) (y : pr1 PY₁),
?h x (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 PY₁)) =
?h (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 PX)) y
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
PX, PY₁, PY₂: category_of_hset_struct P
f: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ PY₁, PY₂ ⟧
∏ x₁ x₂ : pr1 PX,
?h x₁ (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 PY₁)) =
?h x₂ (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 PY₁))

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
PX, PY₁, PY₂: category_of_hset_struct P
f: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ PY₁, PY₂ ⟧
pr1 PX → pr1 PY₁ → pr1 (PX ∧* PY₂)
 exact (λ x y, setquotpr _ (x ,, pr1 f y)).
      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
PX, PY₁, PY₂: category_of_hset_struct P
f: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ PY₁, PY₂ ⟧
∏ y₁ y₂ : pr1 PY₁,
(λ (x : pr1 PX) (y : pr1 PY₁),
 setquotpr
   (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 PX) (pr2 PY₂))
   (x,, pr1 f y))
  (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 PX)) y₁ =
(λ (x : pr1 PX) (y : pr1 PY₁),
 setquotpr
   (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 PX) (pr2 PY₂))
   (x,, pr1 f y))
  (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 PX)) y₂
 abstract
          (intros y₁ y₂ ;
           use iscompsetquotpr ;
           apply hinhpr ; cbn ;
           use inr ;
           exact (inl (idpath _) ,, inl (idpath _))).
      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
PX, PY₁, PY₂: category_of_hset_struct P
f: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ PY₁, PY₂ ⟧
∏ (x : pr1 PX) (y : pr1 PY₁),
(λ (x0 : pr1 PX) (y0 : pr1 PY₁),
 setquotpr
   (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 PX) (pr2 PY₂))
   (x0,, pr1 f y0)) x
  (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 PY₁)) =
(λ (x0 : pr1 PX) (y0 : pr1 PY₁),
 setquotpr
   (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 PX) (pr2 PY₂))
   (x0,, pr1 f y0))
  (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 PX)) y
 abstract
          (intros x y ;
           use iscompsetquotpr ;
           apply hinhpr ; cbn ;
           use inr ;
           refine (inr _ ,, inl (idpath _)) ;
           apply pointed_hset_struct_preserve_point ;
           exact (pr2 f)).
      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
PX, PY₁, PY₂: category_of_hset_struct P
f: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ PY₁, PY₂ ⟧
∏ x₁ x₂ : pr1 PX,
(λ (x : pr1 PX) (y : pr1 PY₁),
 setquotpr
   (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 PX) (pr2 PY₂))
   (x,, pr1 f y)) x₁
  (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 PY₁)) =
(λ (x : pr1 PX) (y : pr1 PY₁),
 setquotpr
   (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 PX) (pr2 PY₂))
   (x,, pr1 f y)) x₂
  (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 PY₁))
 abstract
          (intros x₁ x₂ ;
           use iscompsetquotpr ;
           apply hinhpr ; cbn ;
           use inr ;
           refine (inr _ ,, inr _) ;
           apply (pointed_hset_struct_preserve_point _ (pr2 f))).
    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
PX, PY₁, PY₂: category_of_hset_struct P
f: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ PY₁, PY₂ ⟧
(λ f : Core.hset_category ⟦ pr1 (PX ∧* PY₁),
       pr1 (PX ∧* PY₂) ⟧,
 Core.mor_disp (pr2 (PX ∧* PY₁)) (pr2 (PX ∧* PY₂)) f)
  (map_from_smash (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 PX) (pr2 PY₁)
     (λ (x : pr1 PX) (y : pr1 PY₁),
      setquotpr
        (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 PX)
           (pr2 PY₂)) (x,, pr1 f y))
     (hset_struct_smash_prod_mor_r_subproof PX PY₁ PY₂
        f)
     (hset_struct_smash_prod_mor_r_subproof0 PX PY₁
        PY₂ f)
     (hset_struct_smash_prod_mor_r_subproof1 PX PY₁
        PY₂ f))
 abstract
        (apply hset_struct_with_smash_map_from_smash ;
         refine (hset_struct_comp
                   P
                   _
                   (hset_struct_with_smash_setquotpr _ (pr2 PX) (pr2 PY₂))) ;
         use hset_struct_pair ;
         [ apply hset_struct_pr1
         | refine (hset_struct_comp P _ (pr2 f)) ;
           apply hset_struct_pr2 ]).
  Defined.

  
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
PY, PX₁, PX₂: category_of_hset_struct P
f: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ PX₁, PX₂ ⟧
category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ PX₁ ∧* PY, PX₂ ∧* PY ⟧

  
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
PY, PX₁, PX₂: category_of_hset_struct P
f: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ PX₁, PX₂ ⟧
category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ PX₁ ∧* PY, PX₂ ∧* PY ⟧

Core.hset_category ⟦ pr1 (PX₁ ∧* PY), pr1 (PX₂ ∧* PY)
⟧

PY, PX₁, PX₂: category_of_hset_struct P

(λ f : Core.hset_category ⟦ pr1 (PX₁ ∧* PY),
       pr1 (PX₂ ∧* PY) ⟧,
 Core.mor_disp (pr2 (PX₁ ∧* PY)) (pr2 (PX₂ ∧* PY)) f)
  ?pr1

⟧

∏ y₁ y₂ : pr1 PY,
?h (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 PX₁)) y₁ =
?h (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 PX₁)) y₂

∏ (x : pr1 PX₁) (y : pr1 PY),
?h x (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 PY)) =
?h (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 PX₁)) y
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
PY, PX₁, PX₂: category_of_hset_struct P
f: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ PX₁, PX₂ ⟧
∏ x₁ x₂ : pr1 PX₁,
?h x₁ (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 PY)) =
?h x₂ (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 PY))

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
PY, PX₁, PX₂: category_of_hset_struct P
f: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ PX₁, PX₂ ⟧
pr1 PX₁ → pr1 PY → pr1 (PX₂ ∧* PY)
 exact (λ x y, setquotpr _ (pr1 f x ,, y)).
      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
PY, PX₁, PX₂: category_of_hset_struct P
f: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ PX₁, PX₂ ⟧
∏ y₁ y₂ : pr1 PY,
(λ (x : pr1 PX₁) (y : pr1 PY),
 setquotpr
   (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 PX₂) (pr2 PY))
   (pr1 f x,, y))
  (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 PX₁)) y₁ =
(λ (x : pr1 PX₁) (y : pr1 PY),
 setquotpr
   (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 PX₂) (pr2 PY))
   (pr1 f x,, y))
  (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 PX₁)) y₂
 abstract
          (intros y₁ y₂ ;
           use iscompsetquotpr ;
           apply hinhpr ; cbn ;
           use inr ;
           refine (inl _ ,, inl _) ;
           apply (pointed_hset_struct_preserve_point _ (pr2 f))).
      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
PY, PX₁, PX₂: category_of_hset_struct P
f: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ PX₁, PX₂ ⟧
∏ (x : pr1 PX₁) (y : pr1 PY),
(λ (x0 : pr1 PX₁) (y0 : pr1 PY),
 setquotpr
   (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 PX₂) (pr2 PY))
   (pr1 f x0,, y0)) x
  (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 PY)) =
(λ (x0 : pr1 PX₁) (y0 : pr1 PY),
 setquotpr
   (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 PX₂) (pr2 PY))
   (pr1 f x0,, y0))
  (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 PX₁)) y
 abstract
          (intros x y ;
           use iscompsetquotpr ;
           apply hinhpr ; cbn ;
           use inr ;
           refine (inr (idpath _) ,, inl _) ;
           apply pointed_hset_struct_preserve_point ;
           exact (pr2 f)).
      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
PY, PX₁, PX₂: category_of_hset_struct P
f: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ PX₁, PX₂ ⟧
∏ x₁ x₂ : pr1 PX₁,
(λ (x : pr1 PX₁) (y : pr1 PY),
 setquotpr
   (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 PX₂) (pr2 PY))
   (pr1 f x,, y)) x₁
  (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 PY)) =
(λ (x : pr1 PX₁) (y : pr1 PY),
 setquotpr
   (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 PX₂) (pr2 PY))
   (pr1 f x,, y)) x₂
  (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 PY))
 abstract
          (intros x₁ x₂ ;
           use iscompsetquotpr ;
           apply hinhpr ; cbn ;
           use inr ;
           exact (inr (idpath _) ,, inr (idpath _))).
    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
PY, PX₁, PX₂: category_of_hset_struct P
f: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ PX₁, PX₂ ⟧
(λ f : Core.hset_category ⟦ pr1 (PX₁ ∧* PY),
       pr1 (PX₂ ∧* PY) ⟧,
 Core.mor_disp (pr2 (PX₁ ∧* PY)) (pr2 (PX₂ ∧* PY)) f)
  (map_from_smash (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 PX₁) (pr2 PY)
     (λ (x : pr1 PX₁) (y : pr1 PY),
      setquotpr
        (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 PX₂)
           (pr2 PY)) (pr1 f x,, y))
     (hset_struct_smash_prod_mor_l_subproof PY PX₁ PX₂
        f)
     (hset_struct_smash_prod_mor_l_subproof0 PY PX₁
        PX₂ f)
     (hset_struct_smash_prod_mor_l_subproof1 PY PX₁
        PX₂ f))
 abstract
        (apply hset_struct_with_smash_map_from_smash ;
         refine (hset_struct_comp
                   P
                   _
                   (hset_struct_with_smash_setquotpr _ (pr2 PX₂) (pr2 PY))) ;
         use hset_struct_pair ;
         [ refine (hset_struct_comp P _ (pr2 f)) ;
           apply hset_struct_pr1
         | apply hset_struct_pr2 ]).
  Defined.

  
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
PY₁, PY₂, PX₁, PX₂: category_of_hset_struct P
f: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ PX₁, PX₂ ⟧
g: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ PY₁, PY₂ ⟧
category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ PX₁ ∧* PY₁, PX₂ ∧* PY₂ ⟧

(λ f : Core.hset_category ⟦ pr1 (PX₁ ∧* PY₁),

 Core.mor_disp (pr2 (PX₁ ∧* PY₁)) (pr2 (PX₂ ∧* PY₂)) f)

pr1 PX₁ → pr1 PY₁ → pr1 (PX₂ ∧* PY₂)

f: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ PX₁, PX₂ ⟧
g: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ PY₁, PY₂ ⟧
∏ y₁ y₂ : pr1 PY₁,
?h (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 PX₁)) y₁ =

P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
PY₁, PY₂, PX₁, PX₂: category_of_hset_struct P
f: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ PX₁, PX₂ ⟧
g: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ PY₁, PY₂ ⟧
pr1 PX₁ → pr1 PY₁ → pr1 (PX₂ ∧* PY₂)
 exact (λ x y, setquotpr _ (pr1 f x ,, pr1 g y)).
      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
PY₁, PY₂, PX₁, PX₂: category_of_hset_struct P
f: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ PX₁, PX₂ ⟧
g: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ PY₁, PY₂ ⟧
∏ y₁ y₂ : pr1 PY₁,
(λ (x : pr1 PX₁) (y : pr1 PY₁),
 setquotpr
   (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 PX₂) (pr2 PY₂))
   (pr1 f x,, pr1 g y))
  (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 PX₁)) y₁ =
(λ (x : pr1 PX₁) (y : pr1 PY₁),
 setquotpr
   (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 PX₂) (pr2 PY₂))
   (pr1 f x,, pr1 g y))
  (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 PX₁)) y₂
 abstract
          (intros y₁ y₂ ;
           use iscompsetquotpr ;
           apply hinhpr ; cbn ;
           use inr ;
           refine (inl _ ,, inl _) ;
           apply (pointed_hset_struct_preserve_point _ (pr2 f))).
      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
PY₁, PY₂, PX₁, PX₂: category_of_hset_struct P
f: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ PX₁, PX₂ ⟧
g: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ PY₁, PY₂ ⟧
∏ (x : pr1 PX₁) (y : pr1 PY₁),
(λ (x0 : pr1 PX₁) (y0 : pr1 PY₁),
 setquotpr
   (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 PX₂) (pr2 PY₂))
   (pr1 f x0,, pr1 g y0)) x
  (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 PY₁)) =
(λ (x0 : pr1 PX₁) (y0 : pr1 PY₁),
 setquotpr
   (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 PX₂) (pr2 PY₂))
   (pr1 f x0,, pr1 g y0))
  (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 PX₁)) y
 abstract
          (intros x y ;
           use iscompsetquotpr ;
           apply hinhpr ; cbn ;
           use inr ;
           refine (inr _ ,, inl _) ;
           unfold product_point_coordinate ; cbn ;
           apply pointed_hset_struct_preserve_point ;
           [ exact (pr2 g)
           | exact (pr2 f) ]).
        
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
PY₁, PY₂, PX₁, PX₂: category_of_hset_struct P
f: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ PX₁, PX₂ ⟧
g: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ PY₁, PY₂ ⟧
∏ x₁ x₂ : pr1 PX₁,
(λ (x : pr1 PX₁) (y : pr1 PY₁),
 setquotpr
   (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 PX₂) (pr2 PY₂))
   (pr1 f x,, pr1 g y)) x₁
  (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 PY₁)) =
(λ (x : pr1 PX₁) (y : pr1 PY₁),
 setquotpr
   (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 PX₂) (pr2 PY₂))
   (pr1 f x,, pr1 g y)) x₂
  (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 PY₁))
 abstract
            (intros x y ;
             use iscompsetquotpr ;
             apply hinhpr ; cbn ;
             use inr ;
             refine (inr _ ,, inr _) ;
             unfold product_point_coordinate ; cbn ;
             apply pointed_hset_struct_preserve_point ;
             [ exact (pr2 g)
             | exact (pr2 g) ]).
    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
PY₁, PY₂, PX₁, PX₂: category_of_hset_struct P
f: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ PX₁, PX₂ ⟧
g: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ PY₁, PY₂ ⟧
(λ f : Core.hset_category ⟦ pr1 (PX₁ ∧* PY₁),
       pr1 (PX₂ ∧* PY₂) ⟧,
 Core.mor_disp (pr2 (PX₁ ∧* PY₁)) (pr2 (PX₂ ∧* PY₂)) f)
  (map_from_smash (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 PX₁) (pr2 PY₁)
     (λ (x : pr1 PX₁) (y : pr1 PY₁),
      setquotpr
        (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 PX₂)
           (pr2 PY₂)) (pr1 f x,, pr1 g y))
     (hset_struct_smash_prod_mor_subproof PY₁ PY₂ PX₁
        PX₂ f g)
     (hset_struct_smash_prod_mor_subproof0 PY₁ PY₂ PX₁
        PX₂ f g)
     (hset_struct_smash_prod_mor_subproof1 PY₁ PY₂ PX₁
        PX₂ f g))
 abstract
        (apply hset_struct_with_smash_map_from_smash ;
         refine (hset_struct_comp
                   P
                   _
                   (hset_struct_with_smash_setquotpr _ (pr2 PX₂) (pr2 PY₂))) ;
         use hset_struct_pair ;
         [ refine (hset_struct_comp P _ (pr2 f)) ;
           apply hset_struct_pr1
         | refine (hset_struct_comp P _ (pr2 g)) ;
           apply hset_struct_pr2 ]).
  Defined.

  Local Notation "f '#∧*' g" := (hset_struct_smash_prod_mor f g) (at level 30).

  
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
tensor_data (category_of_hset_struct P)

  
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
tensor_data (category_of_hset_struct P)

    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
category_of_hset_struct P
→ category_of_hset_struct P
  → category_of_hset_struct P
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
∏ a b1 b2 : category_of_hset_struct P,
category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ b1, b2 ⟧
→ category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ ?pr1 a b1, ?pr1 a b2 ⟧
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
(λ _ : ∏ a b1 b2 : category_of_hset_struct P,
       category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ b1, b2 ⟧
       → category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ ?pr1 a b1,
         ?pr1 a b2 ⟧,
 ∏ b a1 a2 : category_of_hset_struct P,
 category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
 → category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ ?pr1 a1 b, ?pr1 a2 b ⟧)
  ?pr10

    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
category_of_hset_struct P
→ category_of_hset_struct P
  → category_of_hset_struct P
 exact (λ X Y, X ∧* Y).
    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
∏ a b1 b2 : category_of_hset_struct P,
category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ b1, b2 ⟧
→ category_of_hset_struct P
  ⟦ (λ X Y : category_of_hset_struct P, X ∧* Y) a b1,
  (λ X Y : category_of_hset_struct P, X ∧* Y) a b2 ⟧
 exact (λ X Y₁ Y₂ f, hset_struct_smash_prod_mor_r X f).
    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
(λ _ : ∏ a b1 b2 : category_of_hset_struct P,
       category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ b1, b2 ⟧
       → category_of_hset_struct P
         ⟦ (λ X Y : category_of_hset_struct P, X ∧* Y)
             a b1,
         (λ X Y : category_of_hset_struct P, X ∧* Y) a
           b2 ⟧,
 ∏ b a1 a2 : category_of_hset_struct P,
 category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
 → category_of_hset_struct P
   ⟦ (λ X Y : category_of_hset_struct P, X ∧* Y) a1 b,
   (λ X Y : category_of_hset_struct P, X ∧* Y) a2 b ⟧)
  (λ (X Y₁ Y₂ : category_of_hset_struct P)
   (f : category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ Y₁, Y₂ ⟧),
   hset_struct_smash_prod_mor_r X f)
 exact (λ Y X₁ X₂ f, hset_struct_smash_prod_mor_l Y f).
  Defined.

  (**
   2. Unitors

→ pr1 X → pr1 X
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X: category_of_hset_struct P
∏ y₁ y₂ : pr1 X,
?h
  (hset_struct_point (pr12 P)
     (pr2 (hset_struct_with_smash_closed_unit P))) y₁ =
?h
  (hset_struct_point (pr12 P)
     (pr2 (hset_struct_with_smash_closed_unit P))) y₂

(y : pr1 X),
?h x (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 X)) =
?h
  (hset_struct_point (pr12 P)
     (pr2 (hset_struct_with_smash_closed_unit P))) y

X: category_of_hset_struct P

?h x₁ (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 X)) =
?h x₂ (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 X))

→ pr1 X → pr1 X

∏ y₁ y₂ : pr1 X,
(λ (b : pr1 (hset_struct_with_smash_closed_unit P))
 (x : pr1 X),
 if b then x else hset_struct_point P (pr2 X))
  (hset_struct_point (pr12 P)
     (pr2 (hset_struct_with_smash_closed_unit P))) y₁ =

 (x : pr1 X),
 if b then x else hset_struct_point P (pr2 X))
  (hset_struct_point (pr12 P)
     (pr2 (hset_struct_with_smash_closed_unit P))) y₂
 abstract
          (intros x₁ x₂ ; cbn ;
           rewrite hset_struct_with_smash_point_unit ;
           apply idpath).
      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X: category_of_hset_struct P
∏ (x : pr1 (hset_struct_with_smash_closed_unit P))
(y : pr1 X),
(λ (b : pr1 (hset_struct_with_smash_closed_unit P))
 (x0 : pr1 X),
 if b then x0 else hset_struct_point P (pr2 X)) x
  (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 X)) =
(λ (b : pr1 (hset_struct_with_smash_closed_unit P))
 (x0 : pr1 X),
 if b then x0 else hset_struct_point P (pr2 X))
  (hset_struct_point (pr12 P)
     (pr2 (hset_struct_with_smash_closed_unit P))) y
 abstract
          (intros b x ; cbn ;
           rewrite hset_struct_with_smash_point_unit ;
           induction b ; apply idpath).
      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X: category_of_hset_struct P
∏ x₁ x₂ : pr1 (hset_struct_with_smash_closed_unit P),
(λ (b : pr1 (hset_struct_with_smash_closed_unit P))
 (x : pr1 X),
 if b then x else hset_struct_point P (pr2 X)) x₁
  (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 X)) =

 (x : pr1 X),
 if b then x else hset_struct_point P (pr2 X)) x₂
  (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 X))
 abstract
          (intros b₁ b₂ ; cbn ;
           induction b₁ ; induction b₂ ; cbn ;
           apply idpath).
    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X: category_of_hset_struct P
(λ f : Core.hset_category
       ⟦ pr1
           (bifunctor_on_objects
              smash_product_tensor_data
              (hset_struct_with_smash_closed_unit P) X),
       pr1 X ⟧,
 Core.mor_disp
   (pr2
      (bifunctor_on_objects smash_product_tensor_data
         (hset_struct_with_smash_closed_unit P) X))
   (pr2 X) f)
  (map_from_smash (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
     (pr2 (hset_struct_with_smash_closed_unit P))
     (pr2 X)
     (λ (b : pr1
               (hset_struct_with_smash_closed_unit P))
      (x : pr1 X),
      if b then x else hset_struct_point P (pr2 X))
     (hset_struct_smash_prod_lunitor_subproof X)
     (hset_struct_smash_prod_lunitor_subproof0 X)
     (hset_struct_smash_prod_lunitor_subproof1 X))
 
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X: category_of_hset_struct P
mor_hset_struct P
  (hset_struct_prod P
     (pr2 (hset_struct_with_smash_closed_unit P))
     (pr2 X)) (pr2 X)
  (λ xy : (pr1 (hset_struct_with_smash_closed_unit P)
           × pr1 X)%set,
   if pr1 xy
   then pr2 xy
   else hset_struct_point P (pr2 X))

X: category_of_hset_struct P
mor_hset_struct (pr1 P)
  (hset_struct_prod P
     (pr2 (hset_struct_with_smash_closed_unit P))
     (pr2 X)) (hset_struct_with_smash_unit (pr122 P))
  pr1

X: category_of_hset_struct P
mor_hset_struct (pr1 P)
  (hset_struct_prod P
     (pr2 (hset_struct_with_smash_closed_unit P))
     (pr2 X)) (pr2 X) pr2

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed

mor_hset_struct (pr1 P)
  (hset_struct_prod P
     (pr2 (hset_struct_with_smash_closed_unit P))
     (pr2 X)) (hset_struct_with_smash_unit (pr122 P))
  pr1
 apply hset_struct_pr1.

mor_hset_struct (pr1 P)

 apply hset_struct_pr2.

         X (hset_struct_with_smash_closed_unit P)))
   (pr2 X) f)
  (map_from_smash (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
     (pr2 (hset_struct_with_smash_closed_unit P))
     (λ (x : pr1 X)
      (b : pr1 (hset_struct_with_smash_closed_unit P)),
      if b then x else hset_struct_point P (pr2 X))
     (hset_struct_smash_prod_runitor_subproof X)
     (hset_struct_smash_prod_runitor_subproof0 X)
     (hset_struct_smash_prod_runitor_subproof1 X))
 
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X: category_of_hset_struct P
mor_hset_struct P
  (hset_struct_prod P (pr2 X)
     (pr2 (hset_struct_with_smash_closed_unit P)))
  (pr2 X)
  (λ xy : (pr1 X
           × pr1
               (hset_struct_with_smash_closed_unit P))%set,
   if pr2 xy
   then pr1 xy
   else hset_struct_point P (pr2 X))

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X: category_of_hset_struct P
mor_hset_struct (pr1 P)
  (hset_struct_prod P (pr2 X)
     (pr2 (hset_struct_with_smash_closed_unit P)))
  (hset_struct_with_smash_unit (pr122 P)) pr2
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X: category_of_hset_struct P
mor_hset_struct (pr1 P)
  (hset_struct_prod P (pr2 X)
     (pr2 (hset_struct_with_smash_closed_unit P)))
  (pr2 X) pr1

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X: category_of_hset_struct P
mor_hset_struct (pr1 P)
  (hset_struct_prod P (pr2 X)
     (pr2 (hset_struct_with_smash_closed_unit P)))
  (hset_struct_with_smash_unit (pr122 P)) pr2
 apply hset_struct_pr2.
      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X: category_of_hset_struct P
mor_hset_struct (pr1 P)
  (hset_struct_prod P (pr2 X)
     (pr2 (hset_struct_with_smash_closed_unit P)))
  (pr2 X) pr1
 apply hset_struct_pr1.
  Defined.

  
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
rightunitorinv_data smash_product_tensor_data
  (hset_struct_with_smash_closed_unit P)

  
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
rightunitorinv_data smash_product_tensor_data
  (hset_struct_with_smash_closed_unit P)

    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X: category_of_hset_struct P
category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ X,
bifunctor_on_objects smash_product_tensor_data X
  (hset_struct_with_smash_closed_unit P) ⟧

    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X: category_of_hset_struct P
Core.hset_category ⟦ pr1 X,
pr1
  (bifunctor_on_objects smash_product_tensor_data X
     (hset_struct_with_smash_closed_unit P)) ⟧
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X: category_of_hset_struct P
(λ f : Core.hset_category ⟦ pr1 X,
       pr1
         (bifunctor_on_objects
            smash_product_tensor_data X
            (hset_struct_with_smash_closed_unit P)) ⟧,
 Core.mor_disp (pr2 X)
   (pr2
      (bifunctor_on_objects smash_product_tensor_data
         X (hset_struct_with_smash_closed_unit P))) f)
  ?pr1

    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X: category_of_hset_struct P
Core.hset_category ⟦ pr1 X,
pr1
  (bifunctor_on_objects smash_product_tensor_data X
     (hset_struct_with_smash_closed_unit P)) ⟧
 exact (λ x, setquotpr _ (x ,, true)).
    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X: category_of_hset_struct P
(λ f : Core.hset_category ⟦ pr1 X,
       pr1
         (bifunctor_on_objects
            smash_product_tensor_data X
            (hset_struct_with_smash_closed_unit P)) ⟧,
 Core.mor_disp (pr2 X)
   (pr2
      (bifunctor_on_objects smash_product_tensor_data
         X (hset_struct_with_smash_closed_unit P))) f)
  (λ x : pr1 X,
   setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
        (pr2 (hset_struct_with_smash_closed_unit P)))
     (x,, true))
 apply hset_struct_with_smash_setquotpr_l.
  Defined.

  (**
   3. The braiding
   *)
  
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y: category_of_hset_struct P
category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ X ∧* Y, Y ∧* X ⟧

  
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y: category_of_hset_struct P
category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ X ∧* Y, Y ∧* X ⟧

    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y: category_of_hset_struct P
Core.hset_category ⟦ pr1 (X ∧* Y), pr1 (Y ∧* X) ⟧
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y: category_of_hset_struct P
(λ f : Core.hset_category ⟦ pr1 (X ∧* Y), pr1 (Y ∧* X)
       ⟧,
 Core.mor_disp (pr2 (X ∧* Y)) (pr2 (Y ∧* X)) f) ?pr1

    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y: category_of_hset_struct P
Core.hset_category ⟦ pr1 (X ∧* Y), pr1 (Y ∧* X) ⟧
 
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y: category_of_hset_struct P
pr1 X → pr1 Y → pr1 (Y ∧* X)
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y: category_of_hset_struct P
∏ y₁ y₂ : pr1 Y,
?h (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 X)) y₁ =
?h (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 X)) y₂
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y: category_of_hset_struct P
∏ (x : pr1 X) (y : pr1 Y),
?h x (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 Y)) =
?h (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 X)) y
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y: category_of_hset_struct P
∏ x₁ x₂ : pr1 X,
?h x₁ (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 Y)) =
?h x₂ (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 Y))

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y: category_of_hset_struct P
pr1 X → pr1 Y → pr1 (Y ∧* X)
 exact (λ x y, setquotpr _ (y ,, x)).
      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y: category_of_hset_struct P
∏ y₁ y₂ : pr1 Y,
(λ (x : pr1 X) (y : pr1 Y),
 setquotpr
   (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y) (pr2 X))
   (y,, x)) (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 X)) y₁ =
(λ (x : pr1 X) (y : pr1 Y),
 setquotpr
   (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y) (pr2 X))
   (y,, x)) (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 X)) y₂
 abstract
          (intros y₁ y₂ ;
           use iscompsetquotpr ;
           apply hinhpr ;
           use inr ;
           split ; use inr ; apply idpath).
      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y: category_of_hset_struct P
∏ (x : pr1 X) (y : pr1 Y),
(λ (x0 : pr1 X) (y0 : pr1 Y),
 setquotpr
   (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y) (pr2 X))
   (y0,, x0)) x (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 Y)) =
(λ (x0 : pr1 X) (y0 : pr1 Y),
 setquotpr
   (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y) (pr2 X))
   (y0,, x0)) (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 X)) y
 abstract
          (intros x y ;
           use iscompsetquotpr ;
           apply hinhpr ;
           use inr ;
           split ; [ use inl | use inr  ] ;
           apply idpath).
      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y: category_of_hset_struct P
∏ x₁ x₂ : pr1 X,
(λ (x : pr1 X) (y : pr1 Y),
 setquotpr
   (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y) (pr2 X))
   (y,, x)) x₁ (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 Y)) =
(λ (x : pr1 X) (y : pr1 Y),
 setquotpr
   (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y) (pr2 X))
   (y,, x)) x₂ (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 Y))
 abstract
          (intros x₁ x₂ ;
           use iscompsetquotpr ;
           apply hinhpr ;
           use inr ;
           split ; use inl ; apply idpath).
    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y: category_of_hset_struct P
(λ f : Core.hset_category ⟦ pr1 (X ∧* Y), pr1 (Y ∧* X)
       ⟧,
 Core.mor_disp (pr2 (X ∧* Y)) (pr2 (Y ∧* X)) f)
  (map_from_smash (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y)
     (λ (x : pr1 X) (y : pr1 Y),
      setquotpr
        (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y) (pr2 X))
        (y,, x))
     (smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding_subproof X Y)
     (smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding_subproof0 X
        Y)
     (smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding_subproof1 X
        Y))
 
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y: category_of_hset_struct P
mor_hset_struct P (hset_struct_prod P (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))
  (pr2 (Y ∧* X))
  (λ xy : (pr1 X × pr1 Y)%set,
   setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y) (pr2 X))
     (pr2 xy,, pr1 xy))

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y: category_of_hset_struct P
mor_hset_struct P (hset_struct_prod P (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))
  (hset_struct_prod P (pr2 Y) (pr2 X))
  (λ x : (pr1 X × pr1 Y)%set, pr2 x,, pr1 x)

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y: category_of_hset_struct P
mor_hset_struct P (hset_struct_prod P (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))
  (pr2 Y) pr2
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y: category_of_hset_struct P
mor_hset_struct P (hset_struct_prod P (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))
  (pr2 X) pr1

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y: category_of_hset_struct P
mor_hset_struct P (hset_struct_prod P (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))
  (pr2 Y) pr2
 apply hset_struct_pr2.
      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y: category_of_hset_struct P
mor_hset_struct P (hset_struct_prod P (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))
  (pr2 X) pr1
 apply hset_struct_pr1.
  Defined.

  (**
   4. The associators
   *)

  (**
   Note: `hset_struct_smash_prod_lassociator_mor` is used to prove
   that the associator is structure preserving, whereas
   `hset_struct_smash_prod_lassociator_mor_alt_fun` is used for
   calculations.
   *)
  Definition hset_struct_smash_unlam
             {X Y Z : ∁}
             (f : X --> Y -->* Z)
    : X ∧* Y --> Z
    := f #∧* identity _ · hset_struct_with_smash_closed_eval Y Z.

  Definition hset_struct_smash_unlam'
             {X Y Z : ∁}
             (f : Y --> X -->* Z)
    : X ∧* Y --> Z
    := smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding _ _ · hset_struct_smash_unlam f.

  
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ (X ∧* Y) ∧* Z, X ∧* Y ∧* Z
⟧

X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ (X ∧* Y) ∧* Z, X ∧* Y ∧* Z
⟧

category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ X ∧* Y,
Z -->* (X ∧* Y ∧* Z) ⟧

category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ X,
Y -->* Z -->* (X ∧* Y ∧* Z) ⟧

    apply identity.
  Defined.

isaset (pr11 (X ∧* Y ∧* Z))
 apply setproperty.
    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
z: pr11 Z
pr1 X → pr1 Y → pr11 (X ∧* Y ∧* Z)
 exact (λ x y, setquotpr _ (x ,, setquotpr _ (y ,, z))).
    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
z: pr11 Z
∏ y₁ y₂ : pr1 Y,
(λ (x : pr1 X) (y : pr1 Y),
 setquotpr
   (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
      (pr2 (Y ∧* Z)))
   (x,,
    setquotpr
      (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z))
      (y,, z))) (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 X))
  y₁ =
(λ (x : pr1 X) (y : pr1 Y),
 setquotpr
   (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
      (pr2 (Y ∧* Z)))
   (x,,
    setquotpr
      (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z))
      (y,, z))) (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 X))
  y₂
 abstract
        (intros y₁ y₂ ;
         use iscompsetquotpr ;
         apply hinhpr ;
         use inr ;
         unfold product_point_coordinate ; cbn ;
         split ; use inl ; apply idpath).
    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
z: pr11 Z
∏ (x : pr1 X) (y : pr1 Y),
(λ (x0 : pr1 X) (y0 : pr1 Y),
 setquotpr
   (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
      (pr2 (Y ∧* Z)))
   (x0,,
    setquotpr
      (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z))
      (y0,, z))) x
  (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 Y)) =
(λ (x0 : pr1 X) (y0 : pr1 Y),
 setquotpr
   (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
      (pr2 (Y ∧* Z)))
   (x0,,
    setquotpr
      (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z))
      (y0,, z))) (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 X))
  y
 abstract
        (intros x y ;
         use iscompsetquotpr ;
         apply hinhpr ;
         use inr ;
         unfold product_point_coordinate ;
         split ; [ | use inl ; apply idpath ] ;
         use inr ;
         refine (_ @ !(hset_struct_with_smash_closed_point_smash _ _)) ;
         use iscompsetquotpr ; cbn ;
         apply hinhpr ;
         use inr ;
         unfold product_point_coordinate ; cbn ;
         split ; use inl ; apply idpath).
    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
z: pr11 Z
∏ x₁ x₂ : pr1 X,
(λ (x : pr1 X) (y : pr1 Y),
 setquotpr
   (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
      (pr2 (Y ∧* Z)))
   (x,,
    setquotpr
      (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z))
      (y,, z))) x₁
  (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 Y)) =
(λ (x : pr1 X) (y : pr1 Y),
 setquotpr
   (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
      (pr2 (Y ∧* Z)))
   (x,,
    setquotpr
      (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z))
      (y,, z))) x₂
  (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 Y))
 abstract
        (intros x₁ x₂ ;
         use iscompsetquotpr ;
         apply hinhpr ;
         use inr ;
         unfold product_point_coordinate ; split ; cbn ; use inr ;
         refine (_ @ !(hset_struct_with_smash_closed_point_smash _ _)) ;
         use iscompsetquotpr ; cbn ;
         apply hinhpr ; use inr ;
         unfold product_point_coordinate ; split ; cbn ;
         use inl ;
         apply idpath).
  Defined.

  
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
z₁, z₂: pr11 Z

  (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 (X ∧* Y))) z₁ =
hset_struct_smash_prod_lassociator_mor_alt_fun
  (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 (X ∧* Y))) z₂

  (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 (X ∧* Y))) z₂

z₁, z₂: pr11 Z
hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 (X ∧* Y)) = ?y'

      apply hset_struct_with_smash_closed_point_smash.
    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
z₁, z₂: pr11 Z
hset_struct_smash_prod_lassociator_mor_alt_fun
  (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))
     (hset_struct_point P (pr2 X),,
      hset_struct_point P (pr2 Y))) z₁ =
hset_struct_smash_prod_lassociator_mor_alt_fun
  (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 (X ∧* Y))) z₂

    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
z₁, z₂: pr11 Z
hset_struct_smash_prod_lassociator_mor_alt_fun
  (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 (X ∧* Y))) z₂ =
hset_struct_smash_prod_lassociator_mor_alt_fun
  (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))
     (hset_struct_point P (pr2 X),,
      hset_struct_point P (pr2 Y))) z₁

    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
z₁, z₂: pr11 Z
hset_struct_smash_prod_lassociator_mor_alt_fun
  (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 (X ∧* Y))) z₂ = 
?b
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
z₁, z₂: pr11 Z
?b =
hset_struct_smash_prod_lassociator_mor_alt_fun
  (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))
     (hset_struct_point P (pr2 X),,
      hset_struct_point P (pr2 Y))) z₁

    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
z₁, z₂: pr11 Z
hset_struct_smash_prod_lassociator_mor_alt_fun

X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
z₁, z₂: pr11 Z
smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 (Y ∧* Z))
  (pr11 ((hset_struct_point P (pr2 X),,
          hset_struct_point P (pr2 Y)),,
         eqrelrefl
           (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
              (pr2 Y))
           (hset_struct_point P (pr2 X),,
            hset_struct_point P (pr2 Y))),,
   setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z))
     (pr21 ((hset_struct_point P (pr2 X),,
             hset_struct_point P (pr2 Y)),,
            eqrelrefl
              (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
                 (pr2 Y))

            eqrelrefl

P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
z₁, z₂: pr11 Z
(pr11 ((hset_struct_point P (pr2 X),,
        hset_struct_point P (pr2 Y)),,
       eqrelrefl
         (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))
         (hset_struct_point P (pr2 X),,
          hset_struct_point P (pr2 Y))),,
 setquotpr
   (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z))
   (pr21 ((hset_struct_point P (pr2 X),,
           hset_struct_point P (pr2 Y)),,
          eqrelrefl
            (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
               (pr2 Y))
            (hset_struct_point P (pr2 X),,
             hset_struct_point P (pr2 Y))),, z₂) =
 pr11 ((hset_struct_point P (pr2 X),,
        hset_struct_point P (pr2 Y)),,
       eqrelrefl
         (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))
         (hset_struct_point P (pr2 X),,
          hset_struct_point P (pr2 Y))),,
 setquotpr
   (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z))
   (pr21 ((hset_struct_point P (pr2 X),,
           hset_struct_point P (pr2 Y)),,
          eqrelrefl
            (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
               (pr2 Y))
            (hset_struct_point P (pr2 X),,
             hset_struct_point P (pr2 Y))),, z₁))
⨿ (product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
     (pr2 (Y ∧* Z))
     (pr11 ((hset_struct_point P (pr2 X),,
             hset_struct_point P (pr2 Y)),,
            eqrelrefl
              (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
                 (pr2 Y))
              (hset_struct_point P (pr2 X),,
               hset_struct_point P (pr2 Y))),,
      setquotpr
        (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z))
        (pr21 ((hset_struct_point P (pr2 X),,
                hset_struct_point P (pr2 Y)),,
               eqrelrefl
                 (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
                    (pr2 Y))
                 (hset_struct_point P (pr2 X),,
                  hset_struct_point P (pr2 Y))),, z₂))
   × product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
       (pr2 (Y ∧* Z))
       (pr11 ((hset_struct_point P (pr2 X),,
               hset_struct_point P (pr2 Y)),,
              eqrelrefl
                (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
                   (pr2 Y))
                (hset_struct_point P (pr2 X),,
                 hset_struct_point P (pr2 Y))),,
        setquotpr
          (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y)
             (pr2 Z))
          (pr21 ((hset_struct_point P (pr2 X),,
                  hset_struct_point P (pr2 Y)),,
                 eqrelrefl
                   (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                      (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))
                   (hset_struct_point P (pr2 X),,
                    hset_struct_point P (pr2 Y))),, z₁)))

product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
  ((pr122 P) (pr1 Y) (pr1 Z) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z))

P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
z: pr11 Z
x: pr1 X
y: pr1 Y
smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 (Y ∧* Z))
  (pr11 ((hset_struct_point P (pr2 X),,
          hset_struct_point P (pr2 Y)),,
         eqrelrefl
           (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
              (pr2 Y))
           (hset_struct_point P (pr2 X),,
            hset_struct_point P (pr2 Y))),,
   setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z))
     (pr21 ((hset_struct_point P (pr2 X),,
             hset_struct_point P (pr2 Y)),,
            eqrelrefl
              (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
                 (pr2 Y))
              (hset_struct_point P (pr2 X),,
               hset_struct_point P (pr2 Y))),, z))
  (pr11 ((x,, y),,
         eqrelrefl
           (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
              (pr2 Y)) (x,, y)),,
   setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z))
     (pr21 ((x,, y),,
            eqrelrefl
              (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
                 (pr2 Y)) (x,, y)),,
      hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 Z)))

    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
z: pr11 Z
x: pr1 X
y: pr1 Y
(hset_struct_point P (pr2 X),,
 setquotpr
   (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z))
   (hset_struct_point P (pr2 Y),, z) =
 x,,
 setquotpr
   (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z))
   (y,, hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 Z)))
⨿ (product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
     ((pr122 P) (pr1 Y) (pr1 Z) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z))
     (hset_struct_point P (pr2 X),,
      setquotpr
        (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z))
        (hset_struct_point P (pr2 Y),, z))
   × product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
       ((pr122 P) (pr1 Y) (pr1 Z) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z))
       (x,,
        setquotpr
          (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y)
             (pr2 Z))
          (y,, hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 Z))))

     (hset_struct_point P (pr2 Y),, z) =

     ((pr122 P) (pr1 Y) (pr1 Z) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z)))

P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
x₁: pr1 X
y₁: pr1 Y
x₂: pr1 X
y₂: pr1 Y
smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 (Y ∧* Z))
  (pr11 ((x₁,, y₁),,
         eqrelrefl
           (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
              (pr2 Y)) (x₁,, y₁)),,
   setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z))
     (pr21 ((x₁,, y₁),,
            eqrelrefl
              (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
                 (pr2 Y)) (x₁,, y₁)),,
      hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 Z)))
  (pr11 ((x₂,, y₂),,
         eqrelrefl
           (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
              (pr2 Y)) (x₂,, y₂)),,
   setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z))
     (pr21 ((x₂,, y₂),,
            eqrelrefl
              (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
                 (pr2 Y)) (x₂,, y₂)),,
      hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 Z)))

    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
x₁: pr1 X
y₁: pr1 Y
x₂: pr1 X
y₂: pr1 Y
(x₁,,
 setquotpr
   (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z))
   (y₁,, hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 Z)) =
 x₂,,
 setquotpr
   (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z))
   (y₂,, hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 Z)))
⨿ (product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
     ((pr122 P) (pr1 Y) (pr1 Z) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z))
     (x₁,,
      setquotpr
        (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z))
        (y₁,, hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 Z)))
   × product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
       ((pr122 P) (pr1 Y) (pr1 Z) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z))
       (x₂,,
        setquotpr
          (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y)
             (pr2 Z))
          (y₂,, hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 Z))))

    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
x₁: pr1 X
y₁: pr1 Y
x₂: pr1 X
y₂: pr1 Y
product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
  ((pr122 P) (pr1 Y) (pr1 Z) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z))
  (x₁,,
   setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z))
     (y₁,, hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 Z)))
× product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
    ((pr122 P) (pr1 Y) (pr1 Z) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z))
    (x₂,,
     setquotpr
       (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z))
       (y₂,, hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 Z)))

    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
x₁: pr1 X
y₁: pr1 Y
x₂: pr1 X
y₂: pr1 Y
(x₁ = hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 X))
⨿ (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z))
     (y₁,, hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 Z)) =
   hset_struct_point (pr12 P)
     ((pr122 P) (pr1 Y) (pr1 Z) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z)))
× (x₂ = hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 X))
  ⨿ (setquotpr
       (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z))
       (y₂,, hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 Z)) =
     hset_struct_point (pr12 P)
       ((pr122 P) (pr1 Y) (pr1 Z) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z)))

  ((λ c : setquot

     x)

         (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 (X ∧* Y))
            (pr2 Z)) (c,, z)) =
    hset_struct_smash_prod_lassociator_mor_alt X Y Z
      (setquotpr
         (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 (X ∧* Y))
            (pr2 Z)) (c,, z))) x)

      apply setproperty.
    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
z: pr1 Z
∏ x : pr1 X × pr1 Y,
(λ c : setquot
         (pr1
            (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
               (pr2 Y))),
 pr1 (hset_struct_smash_prod_lassociator_mor X Y Z)
   (setquotpr
      (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 (X ∧* Y))
         (pr2 Z)) (c,, z)) =
 hset_struct_smash_prod_lassociator_mor_alt X Y Z
   (setquotpr
      (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 (X ∧* Y))
         (pr2 Z)) (c,, z)))
  (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y)) x)

    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
z: pr1 Z
xy: pr1 X × pr1 Y
(λ c : setquot
         (pr1
            (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
               (pr2 Y))),
 pr1 (hset_struct_smash_prod_lassociator_mor X Y Z)
   (setquotpr
      (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 (X ∧* Y))
         (pr2 Z)) (c,, z)) =
 hset_struct_smash_prod_lassociator_mor_alt X Y Z
   (setquotpr
      (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 (X ∧* Y))
         (pr2 Z)) (c,, z)))
  (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y)) xy)

    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
z: pr1 Z
x: pr1 X
y: pr1 Y
pr1 (hset_struct_smash_prod_lassociator_mor X Y Z)
  (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 (X ∧* Y))
        (pr2 Z))
     (setquotpr
        (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))
        (x,, y),, z)) =
hset_struct_smash_prod_lassociator_mor_alt X Y Z
  (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 (X ∧* Y))
        (pr2 Z))
     (setquotpr
        (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))
        (x,, y),, z))

    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
z: pr1 Z
x: pr1 X
y: pr1 Y
ishinh_UU
  ((x,,
    setquotpr
      (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z))
      (y,, z) =
    x,,
    setquotpr
      (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z))
      (y,, z))
   ⨿ (product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
        (pr2 X)
        ((pr122 P) (pr1 Y) (pr1 Z) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z))
        (x,,
         setquotpr
           (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y)
              (pr2 Z)) (y,, z))
      × product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
          (pr2 X)
          ((pr122 P) (pr1 Y) (pr1 Z) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z))
          (x,,
           setquotpr
             (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y)
                (pr2 Z)) (y,, z))))

    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
z: pr1 Z
x: pr1 X
y: pr1 Y
(x,,
 setquotpr
   (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z))
   (y,, z) =
 x,,
 setquotpr
   (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z))
   (y,, z))
⨿ (product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
     ((pr122 P) (pr1 Y) (pr1 Z) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z))
     (x,,
      setquotpr
        (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z))
        (y,, z))
   × product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
       ((pr122 P) (pr1 Y) (pr1 Z) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z))
       (x,,
        setquotpr
          (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y)
             (pr2 Z)) (y,, z)))

    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
z: pr1 Z
x: pr1 X
y: pr1 Y
x,,
setquotpr
  (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z))
  (y,, z) =
x,,
setquotpr
  (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z))
  (y,, z)

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
associator_data smash_product_tensor_data

  
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
associator_data smash_product_tensor_data

    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
category_of_hset_struct P
⟦ bifunctor_on_objects smash_product_tensor_data
    (bifunctor_on_objects smash_product_tensor_data X
       Y) Z,
bifunctor_on_objects smash_product_tensor_data X
  (bifunctor_on_objects smash_product_tensor_data Y Z)
⟧

    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
Core.mor_disp
  (pr2
     (bifunctor_on_objects smash_product_tensor_data
        (bifunctor_on_objects
           smash_product_tensor_data X Y) Z))
  (pr2
     (bifunctor_on_objects smash_product_tensor_data X
        (bifunctor_on_objects
           smash_product_tensor_data Y Z)))
  (hset_struct_smash_prod_lassociator_mor_alt X Y Z)

    abstract
      (exact (transportf
                (mor_hset_struct P _ _)
                (hset_struct_smash_prod_lassociator_mor_eq_to_alt X Y Z)
                (pr2 (hset_struct_smash_prod_lassociator_mor X Y Z)))).
  Defined.

  (**
   Note: `hset_struct_smash_prod_rassociator_mor` is used to prove
   that the associator is structure preserving, whereas
   `hset_struct_smash_prod_rassociator_mor_alt_fun` is used for
   calculations.
   *)
  
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ X ∧* Y ∧* Z, (X ∧* Y) ∧* Z
⟧

  
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ X ∧* Y ∧* Z, (X ∧* Y) ∧* Z
⟧

    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ Y ∧* Z,
X -->* ((X ∧* Y) ∧* Z) ⟧

    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ Z,
Y -->* X -->* ((X ∧* Y) ∧* Z) ⟧

    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ Z,
(Y ∧* X) -->* ((X ∧* Y) ∧* Z) ⟧

    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ Z ∧* Y ∧* X, (X ∧* Y) ∧* Z
⟧

    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ Y ∧* X, X ∧* Y ⟧

    apply smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding.
  Defined.

x: pr11 X
yz: pr11 (Y ∧* Z)
pr11 ((X ∧* Y) ∧* Z)

x: pr11 X
yz: pr11 (Y ∧* Z)
pr11 ((X ∧* Y) ∧* Z)

x: pr11 X
pr11 (Y ∧* Z) → pr11 ((X ∧* Y) ∧* Z)

x: pr11 X
isaset (pr11 ((X ∧* Y) ∧* Z))

x: pr11 X
pr1 Y → pr1 Z → pr11 ((X ∧* Y) ∧* Z)

X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
x: pr11 X
∏ y₁ y₂ : pr1 Z,
?h (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 Y)) y₁ =
?h (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 Y)) y₂

x: pr11 X
∏ (x0 : pr1 Y) (y : pr1 Z),
?h x0 (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 Z)) =
?h (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 Y)) y

X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
x: pr11 X
∏ x₁ x₂ : pr1 Y,
?h x₁ (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 Z)) =
?h x₂ (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 Z))

    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
x: pr11 X
isaset (pr11 ((X ∧* Y) ∧* Z))
 apply setproperty.
    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
x: pr11 X
pr1 Y → pr1 Z → pr11 ((X ∧* Y) ∧* Z)
 exact (λ y z, setquotpr _ (setquotpr _ (x ,, y) ,, z)).
    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
x: pr11 X
∏ y₁ y₂ : pr1 Z,
(λ (y : pr1 Y) (z : pr1 Z),
 setquotpr
   (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 (X ∧* Y))
      (pr2 Z))
   (setquotpr
      (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))
      (x,, y),, z))
  (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 Y)) y₁ =
(λ (y : pr1 Y) (z : pr1 Z),
 setquotpr
   (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 (X ∧* Y))
      (pr2 Z))
   (setquotpr
      (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))
      (x,, y),, z))
  (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 Y)) y₂
 abstract
        (intros z₁ z₂ ;
         use iscompsetquotpr ;
         apply hinhpr ; cbn ;
         use inr ;
         unfold product_point_coordinate ;
         split ; use inl ; cbn ;
         refine (_ @ !(hset_struct_with_smash_closed_point_smash _ _)) ;
         use iscompsetquotpr ;
         apply hinhpr ; cbn ;
         use inr ;
         unfold product_point_coordinate ;
         split ;
         use inr ;
         apply idpath).
    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
x: pr11 X
∏ (x0 : pr1 Y) (y : pr1 Z),
(λ (y0 : pr1 Y) (z : pr1 Z),
 setquotpr
   (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 (X ∧* Y))
      (pr2 Z))
   (setquotpr
      (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))
      (x,, y0),, z)) x0
  (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 Z)) =
(λ (y0 : pr1 Y) (z : pr1 Z),
 setquotpr
   (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 (X ∧* Y))
      (pr2 Z))
   (setquotpr
      (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))
      (x,, y0),, z))
  (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 Y)) y
 abstract
        (intros y z ;
         use iscompsetquotpr ;
         apply hinhpr ; cbn ;
         use inr ;
         unfold product_point_coordinate ;
         split ; cbn ; [ use inr ; apply idpath | ] ;
         use inl ;
         refine (_ @ !(hset_struct_with_smash_closed_point_smash _ _)) ;
         use iscompsetquotpr ;
         apply hinhpr ; cbn ;
         use inr ;
         unfold product_point_coordinate ;
         split ;
         use inr ;
         apply idpath).
    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
x: pr11 X
∏ x₁ x₂ : pr1 Y,
(λ (y : pr1 Y) (z : pr1 Z),
 setquotpr
   (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 (X ∧* Y))
      (pr2 Z))
   (setquotpr
      (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))
      (x,, y),, z)) x₁
  (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 Z)) =
(λ (y : pr1 Y) (z : pr1 Z),
 setquotpr
   (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 (X ∧* Y))
      (pr2 Z))
   (setquotpr
      (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))
      (x,, y),, z)) x₂
  (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 Z))
 abstract
        (intros y₁ y₂ ;
         use iscompsetquotpr ;
         apply hinhpr ; cbn ;
         use inr ;
         unfold product_point_coordinate ;
         split ; cbn ;
         use inr ;
         apply idpath).
  Defined.

  
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
yz₁, yz₂: pr11 (Y ∧* Z)
hset_struct_smash_prod_rassociator_mor_alt_fun
  (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 X)) yz₁ =
hset_struct_smash_prod_rassociator_mor_alt_fun
  (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 X)) yz₂

  
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
yz₁, yz₂: pr11 (Y ∧* Z)
hset_struct_smash_prod_rassociator_mor_alt_fun
  (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 X)) yz₁ =
hset_struct_smash_prod_rassociator_mor_alt_fun
  (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 X)) yz₂

    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
yz₂: pr11 (Y ∧* Z)
∏ yz₁ : pr11 (Y ∧* Z),
hset_struct_smash_prod_rassociator_mor_alt_fun
  (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 X)) yz₁ =
hset_struct_smash_prod_rassociator_mor_alt_fun
  (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 X)) yz₂

    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
yz₂: pr11 (Y ∧* Z)
∏
x : setquot
      (pr1
         (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z))),
isaprop
  ((λ c : setquot
            (pr1
               (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y)
                  (pr2 Z))),
    hset_struct_smash_prod_rassociator_mor_alt_fun
      (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 X)) c =
    hset_struct_smash_prod_rassociator_mor_alt_fun
      (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 X)) yz₂) x)
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
yz₂: pr11 (Y ∧* Z)
∏ x : pr1 Y × pr1 Z,
(λ c : setquot
         (pr1
            (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y)
               (pr2 Z))),
 hset_struct_smash_prod_rassociator_mor_alt_fun
   (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 X)) c =
 hset_struct_smash_prod_rassociator_mor_alt_fun
   (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 X)) yz₂)
  (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z)) x)

isaprop
  ((λ c : setquot
            (pr1
               (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y)

         (y₁,, z₁)) =

      (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 X)) c) x)

X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
y₁: pr1 Y
z₁: pr1 Z
∏ x : pr1 Y × pr1 Z,
(λ c : setquot
         (pr1
            (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y)
               (pr2 Z))),
 hset_struct_smash_prod_rassociator_mor_alt_fun
   (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 X))
   (setquotpr
      (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z))
      (y₁,, z₁)) =
 hset_struct_smash_prod_rassociator_mor_alt_fun
   (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 X)) c)
  (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z)) x)

    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
y₁: pr1 Y
z₁: pr1 Z
∏
x : setquot
      (pr1
         (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z))),
isaprop
  ((λ c : setquot
            (pr1
               (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y)
                  (pr2 Z))),
    hset_struct_smash_prod_rassociator_mor_alt_fun
      (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 X))
      (setquotpr
         (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z))
         (y₁,, z₁)) =
    hset_struct_smash_prod_rassociator_mor_alt_fun
      (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 X)) c) x)

y₁: pr1 Y
z₁: pr1 Z
x: setquot
  (pr1
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z)))
isaprop
  ((λ c : setquot
            (pr1
               (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y)
                  (pr2 Z))),
    hset_struct_smash_prod_rassociator_mor_alt_fun

         (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z))
         (y₁,, z₁)) =
    hset_struct_smash_prod_rassociator_mor_alt_fun
      (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 X)) c) x)

      apply setproperty.

  (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 X))

P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
y₁: pr1 Y
z₁: pr1 Z
y₂: pr1 Y
z₂: pr1 Z
smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 (X ∧* Y)) (pr2 Z)
  (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))
     (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 X),,
      pr11 ((y₁,, z₁),,
            eqrelrefl
              (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y)
                 (pr2 Z)) (y₁,, z₁))),,
   pr21 ((y₁,, z₁),,
         eqrelrefl
           (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y)
              (pr2 Z)) (y₁,, z₁)))
  (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))
     (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 X),,
      pr11 ((y₂,, z₂),,
            eqrelrefl
              (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y)
                 (pr2 Z)) (y₂,, z₂))),,
   pr21 ((y₂,, z₂),,
         eqrelrefl
           (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y)
              (pr2 Z)) (y₂,, z₂)))

    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
y₁: pr1 Y
z₁: pr1 Z
y₂: pr1 Y
z₂: pr1 Z
(setquotpr
   (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))
   (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 X),, y₁),, z₁ =
 setquotpr
   (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))
   (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 X),, y₂),, z₂)
⨿ (product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
     ((pr122 P) (pr1 X) (pr1 Y) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))
     (pr2 Z)
     (setquotpr
        (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))
        (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 X),, y₁),, z₁)
   × product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
       ((pr122 P) (pr1 X) (pr1 Y) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))
       (pr2 Z)
       (setquotpr
          (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
             (pr2 Y))
          (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 X),, y₂),,
        z₂))

  (setquotpr

 hset_struct_point (pr12 P)

               (pr2 Z))),
 hset_struct_smash_prod_rassociator_mor_alt_fun x
   (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 (Y ∧* Z))) =
 hset_struct_smash_prod_rassociator_mor_alt_fun
   (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 X)) c)
  (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z)) x0)

X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
x: pr11 X
yz: pr1 Y × pr1 Z
(λ c : setquot
         (pr1
            (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y)
               (pr2 Z))),

P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
x: pr11 X
y: pr1 Y
z: pr1 Z
smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 (X ∧* Y)) (pr2 Z)
  (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))
     (x,,
      pr11 ((hset_struct_point P (pr2 Y),,
             hset_struct_point P (pr2 Z)),,
            eqrelrefl
              (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y)
                 (pr2 Z))
              (hset_struct_point P (pr2 Y),,
               hset_struct_point P (pr2 Z)))),,
   pr21 ((hset_struct_point P (pr2 Y),,
          hset_struct_point P (pr2 Z)),,
         eqrelrefl
           (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y)
              (pr2 Z))
           (hset_struct_point P (pr2 Y),,
            hset_struct_point P (pr2 Z))))
  (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))
     (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 X),,
      pr11 ((y,, z),,
            eqrelrefl
              (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y)
                 (pr2 Z)) (y,, z))),,
   pr21 ((y,, z),,
         eqrelrefl
           (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y)
              (pr2 Z)) (y,, z)))

    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
x: pr11 X
y: pr1 Y
z: pr1 Z
(setquotpr
   (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))
   (x,, hset_struct_point P (pr2 Y)),,
 hset_struct_point P (pr2 Z) =
 setquotpr
   (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))
   (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 X),, y),, z)
⨿ (product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
     ((pr122 P) (pr1 X) (pr1 Y) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))
     (pr2 Z)
     (setquotpr
        (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))
        (x,, hset_struct_point P (pr2 Y)),,
      hset_struct_point P (pr2 Z))
   × product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
       ((pr122 P) (pr1 X) (pr1 Y) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))
       (pr2 Z)
       (setquotpr
          (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
             (pr2 Y))
          (hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 X),, y),, z))

x: pr11 X
y: pr1 Y
z: pr1 Z
product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
  ((pr122 P) (pr1 X) (pr1 Y) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y)) (pr2 Z)
  (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))
     (x,, hset_struct_point P (pr2 Y)),,

z: pr1 Z
(setquotpr

   (x,, hset_struct_point P (pr2 Y)) =

x₁, x₂: pr11 X
product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
  ((pr122 P) (pr1 X) (pr1 Y) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y)) (pr2 Z)
  (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))
     (x₂,, hset_struct_point P (pr2 Y)),,
   hset_struct_point P (pr2 Z))
× product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
    ((pr122 P) (pr1 X) (pr1 Y) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))
    (pr2 Z)
    (setquotpr
       (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))
       (x₁,, hset_struct_point P (pr2 Y)),,
     hset_struct_point P (pr2 Z))

(setquotpr
   (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))
   (x₂,, hset_struct_point P (pr2 Y)) =
 hset_struct_point (pr12 P)
   ((pr122 P) (pr1 X) (pr1 Y) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y)))
⨿ (hset_struct_point P (pr2 Z) =
   hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 Z))
× (setquotpr

x: pr1 X
y: pr1 Y
z: pr1 Z
ishinh_UU
  ((setquotpr
      (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))
      (x,, y),, z =
    setquotpr
      (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))
      (x,, y),, z)
   ⨿ (product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
        ((pr122 P) (pr1 X) (pr1 Y) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))
        (pr2 Z)
        (setquotpr
           (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
              (pr2 Y)) (x,, y),, z)
      × product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
          ((pr122 P) (pr1 X) (pr1 Y) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))
          (pr2 Z)
          (setquotpr
             (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
                (pr2 Y)) (x,, y),, z)))

    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
x: pr1 X
y: pr1 Y
z: pr1 Z
(setquotpr
   (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))
   (x,, y),, z =
 setquotpr
   (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))
   (x,, y),, z)
⨿ (product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
     ((pr122 P) (pr1 X) (pr1 Y) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))
     (pr2 Z)
     (setquotpr
        (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))
        (x,, y),, z)
   × product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
       ((pr122 P) (pr1 X) (pr1 Y) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))
       (pr2 Z)
       (setquotpr
          (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
             (pr2 Y)) (x,, y),, z))

    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
x: pr1 X
y: pr1 Y
z: pr1 Z
setquotpr
  (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))
  (x,, y),, z =
setquotpr
  (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))
  (x,, y),, z

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

associatorinv_data smash_product_tensor_data

  
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
associatorinv_data smash_product_tensor_data

    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
category_of_hset_struct P
⟦ bifunctor_on_objects smash_product_tensor_data X
    (bifunctor_on_objects smash_product_tensor_data Y
       Z),
bifunctor_on_objects smash_product_tensor_data
  (bifunctor_on_objects smash_product_tensor_data X Y)
  Z ⟧

    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
Core.mor_disp
  (pr2
     (bifunctor_on_objects smash_product_tensor_data X
        (bifunctor_on_objects
           smash_product_tensor_data Y Z)))
  (pr2
     (bifunctor_on_objects smash_product_tensor_data
        (bifunctor_on_objects
           smash_product_tensor_data X Y) Z))
  (hset_struct_smash_prod_rassociator_mor_alt X Y Z)

    abstract
      (exact (transportf
                (mor_hset_struct P _ _)
                (hset_struct_smash_prod_rassociator_mor_eq_to_alt X Y Z)
                (pr2 (hset_struct_smash_prod_rassociator_mor X Y Z)))).
  Defined.

x, y, z: category_of_hset_struct P
monoidal_associatordata smash_product_monoidal_data x
  y z
· monoidal_associatorinvdata
    smash_product_monoidal_data x y z =

        x y) z)

· monoidal_associatordata smash_product_monoidal_data

     (bifunctor_on_objects smash_product_monoidal_data
        y z))

P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y: category_of_hset_struct P
leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
  smash_product_monoidal_data X Y Y (identity Y) =
identity
  (bifunctor_on_objects smash_product_monoidal_data X
     Y)

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y: category_of_hset_struct P
∏
x : pr11 (bifunctor_on_objects
            smash_product_monoidal_data X Y),
pr1
  (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
     smash_product_monoidal_data X Y Y (identity Y)) x =
pr1
  (identity
     (bifunctor_on_objects smash_product_monoidal_data
        X Y)) x

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y: category_of_hset_struct P
∏
x : setquot
      (pr1
         (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))),
isaprop
  ((λ c : setquot
            (pr1
               (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
                  (pr2 Y))),
    pr1
      (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
         smash_product_monoidal_data X Y Y
         (identity Y)) c =
    pr1
      (identity
         (bifunctor_on_objects
            smash_product_monoidal_data X Y)) c) x)
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y: category_of_hset_struct P
∏ x : pr1 X × pr1 Y,
(λ c : setquot
         (pr1
            (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
               (pr2 Y))),
 pr1
   (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
      smash_product_monoidal_data X Y Y (identity Y))
   c =
 pr1
   (identity
      (bifunctor_on_objects
         smash_product_monoidal_data X Y)) c)
  (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y)) x)

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y: category_of_hset_struct P
∏
x : setquot
      (pr1
         (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))),
isaprop
  ((λ c : setquot
            (pr1
               (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
                  (pr2 Y))),
    pr1
      (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
         smash_product_monoidal_data X Y Y
         (identity Y)) c =
    pr1
      (identity
         (bifunctor_on_objects
            smash_product_monoidal_data X Y)) c) x)

        
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y: category_of_hset_struct P
x: setquot
  (pr1
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y)))
isaprop
  ((λ c : setquot
            (pr1
               (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
                  (pr2 Y))),
    pr1
      (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
         smash_product_monoidal_data X Y Y
         (identity Y)) c =
    pr1
      (identity
         (bifunctor_on_objects
            smash_product_monoidal_data X Y)) c) x)

        apply setproperty.

X, Y: category_of_hset_struct P
∏ x : pr1 X × pr1 Y,
(λ c : setquot
         (pr1
            (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
               (pr2 Y))),
 pr1
   (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
      smash_product_monoidal_data X Y Y (identity Y))
   c =
 pr1

         smash_product_monoidal_data X Y)) c)
  (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y)) x)

X, Y: category_of_hset_struct P
x: pr1 X × pr1 Y
(λ c : setquot
         (pr1
            (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
               (pr2 Y))),
 pr1
   (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
      smash_product_monoidal_data X Y Y (identity Y))
   c =

P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y: category_of_hset_struct P
x: pr1 X × pr1 Y
smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y)
  (pr11 (x,,
         eqrelrefl
           (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
              (pr2 Y)) x),,
   pr1 (identity Y)
     (pr21 (x,,
            eqrelrefl
              (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
                 (pr2 Y)) x))) x

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y: category_of_hset_struct P
x: pr1 X × pr1 Y
(pr1 x,, pr2 x = x)
⨿ (product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
     (pr2 Y) (pr1 x,, pr2 x)
   × product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
       (pr2 Y) x)

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y: category_of_hset_struct P
x: pr1 X × pr1 Y
pr1 x,, pr2 x = x

      apply idpath.

P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
bifunctor_leftcompax smash_product_monoidal_data
 
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
W, X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
g₁: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g₂: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
  smash_product_monoidal_data W X Z (g₁ · g₂) =
leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
  smash_product_monoidal_data W X Y g₁
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
    smash_product_monoidal_data W Y Z g₂

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
W, X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
g₁: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g₂: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
∏
x : pr11 (bifunctor_on_objects
            smash_product_monoidal_data W X),
pr1
  (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
     smash_product_monoidal_data W X Z (g₁ · g₂)) x =
pr1
  (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
     smash_product_monoidal_data W X Y g₁
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
       smash_product_monoidal_data W Y Z g₂) x

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
W, X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
g₁: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g₂: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
∏
x : setquot
      (pr1
         (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 W) (pr2 X))),
isaprop
  ((λ c : setquot
            (pr1
               (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 W)
                  (pr2 X))),
    pr1
      (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
         smash_product_monoidal_data W X Z (g₁ · g₂))
      c =
    pr1
      (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
         smash_product_monoidal_data W X Y g₁
       · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
           smash_product_monoidal_data W Y Z g₂) c) x)
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
W, X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
g₁: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g₂: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
∏ x : pr1 W × pr1 X,
(λ c : setquot
         (pr1
            (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 W)
               (pr2 X))),
 pr1
   (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
      smash_product_monoidal_data W X Z (g₁ · g₂)) c =
 pr1
   (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
      smash_product_monoidal_data W X Y g₁
    · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
        smash_product_monoidal_data W Y Z g₂) c)
  (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 W) (pr2 X)) x)

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
W, X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
g₁: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g₂: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
∏
x : setquot
      (pr1
         (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 W) (pr2 X))),
isaprop
  ((λ c : setquot
            (pr1
               (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 W)
                  (pr2 X))),
    pr1
      (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
         smash_product_monoidal_data W X Z (g₁ · g₂))
      c =
