      (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
         smash_product_monoidal_data W X Y g₁
       · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
           smash_product_monoidal_data W Y Z g₂) c) x)

        
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
W, X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
g₁: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g₂: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
x: setquot
  (pr1
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 W) (pr2 X)))
isaprop
  ((λ c : setquot
            (pr1
               (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 W)
                  (pr2 X))),
    pr1
      (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
         smash_product_monoidal_data W X Z (g₁ · g₂))
      c =
    pr1
      (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
         smash_product_monoidal_data W X Y g₁
       · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
           smash_product_monoidal_data W Y Z g₂) c) x)

        apply setproperty.
      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
W, X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
g₁: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g₂: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
∏ x : pr1 W × pr1 X,
(λ c : setquot
         (pr1
            (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 W)
               (pr2 X))),
 pr1
   (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
      smash_product_monoidal_data W X Z (g₁ · g₂)) c =
 pr1
   (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
      smash_product_monoidal_data W X Y g₁
    · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
        smash_product_monoidal_data W Y Z g₂) c)
  (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 W) (pr2 X)) x)

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
W, X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
g₁: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g₂: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
x: pr1 W × pr1 X
(λ c : setquot
         (pr1
            (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 W)
               (pr2 X))),
 pr1
   (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
      smash_product_monoidal_data W X Z (g₁ · g₂)) c =
 pr1
   (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
      smash_product_monoidal_data W X Y g₁
    · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
        smash_product_monoidal_data W Y Z g₂) c)
  (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 W) (pr2 X)) x)

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
W, X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
g₁: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g₂: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
x: pr1 W × pr1 X
smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 W) (pr2 Z)
  (pr11 (x,,
         eqrelrefl
           (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 W)
              (pr2 X)) x),,
   pr1 (g₁ · g₂)
     (pr21 (x,,
            eqrelrefl
              (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 W)
                 (pr2 X)) x)))
  (pr11 ((pr11 (x,,
                eqrelrefl
                  (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                     (pr2 W) (pr2 X)) x),,
          pr1 g₁
            (pr21 (x,,
                   eqrelrefl
                     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                        (pr2 W) (pr2 X)) x))),,
         eqrelrefl
           (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 W)
              (pr2 Y))
           (pr11 (x,,
                  eqrelrefl
                    (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                       (pr2 W) (pr2 X)) x),,
            pr1 g₁
              (pr21 (x,,
                     eqrelrefl
                       (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                          (pr2 W) (pr2 X)) x)))),,
   pr1 g₂
     (pr21 ((pr11 (x,,
                   eqrelrefl
                     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                        (pr2 W) (pr2 X)) x),,
             pr1 g₁
               (pr21 (x,,
                      eqrelrefl
                        (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                           (pr2 W) (pr2 X)) x))),,
            eqrelrefl
              (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 W)
                 (pr2 Y))
              (pr11 (x,,
                     eqrelrefl
                       (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                          (pr2 W) (pr2 X)) x),,
               pr1 g₁
                 (pr21 (x,,
                        eqrelrefl
                          (smash_eqrel (pr1 P)
                             (pr12 P) (pr2 W) (pr2 X))
                          x))))))

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
W, X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
g₁: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g₂: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
x: pr1 W × pr1 X
(pr1 x,, pr1 g₂ (pr1 g₁ (pr2 x)) =
 pr1 x,, pr1 g₂ (pr1 g₁ (pr2 x)))
⨿ (product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 W)
     (pr2 Z) (pr1 x,, pr1 g₂ (pr1 g₁ (pr2 x)))
   × product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 W)
       (pr2 Z) (pr1 x,, pr1 g₂ (pr1 g₁ (pr2 x))))

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
W, X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
g₁: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g₂: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
x: pr1 W × pr1 X
pr1 x,, pr1 g₂ (pr1 g₁ (pr2 x)) =
pr1 x,, pr1 g₂ (pr1 g₁ (pr2 x))

      apply idpath.
    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
bifunctor_rightcompax smash_product_monoidal_data
 
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
W, X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
f₁: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ X, Y ⟧
f₂: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
  smash_product_monoidal_data W X Z (f₁ · f₂) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
  smash_product_monoidal_data W X Y f₁
· rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
    smash_product_monoidal_data W Y Z f₂

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
W, X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
f₁: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ X, Y ⟧
f₂: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
∏
x : pr11 (bifunctor_on_objects
            smash_product_monoidal_data X W),
pr1
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
     smash_product_monoidal_data W X Z (f₁ · f₂)) x =
pr1
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
     smash_product_monoidal_data W X Y f₁
   · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
       smash_product_monoidal_data W Y Z f₂) x

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
W, X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
f₁: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ X, Y ⟧
f₂: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
∏
x : setquot
      (pr1
         (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 W))),
isaprop
  ((λ c : setquot
            (pr1
               (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
                  (pr2 W))),
    pr1
      (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
         smash_product_monoidal_data W X Z (f₁ · f₂))
      c =
    pr1
      (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
         smash_product_monoidal_data W X Y f₁
       · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
           smash_product_monoidal_data W Y Z f₂) c) x)
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
W, X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
f₁: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ X, Y ⟧
f₂: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
∏ x : pr1 X × pr1 W,
(λ c : setquot
         (pr1
            (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
               (pr2 W))),
 pr1
   (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
      smash_product_monoidal_data W X Z (f₁ · f₂)) c =
 pr1
   (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
      smash_product_monoidal_data W X Y f₁
    · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
        smash_product_monoidal_data W Y Z f₂) c)
  (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 W)) x)

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
W, X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
f₁: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ X, Y ⟧
f₂: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
∏
x : setquot
      (pr1
         (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 W))),
isaprop
  ((λ c : setquot
            (pr1
               (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
                  (pr2 W))),
    pr1
      (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
         smash_product_monoidal_data W X Z (f₁ · f₂))
      c =
    pr1
      (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
         smash_product_monoidal_data W X Y f₁
       · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
           smash_product_monoidal_data W Y Z f₂) c) x)

        
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
W, X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
f₁: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ X, Y ⟧
f₂: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
x: setquot
  (pr1
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 W)))
isaprop
  ((λ c : setquot
            (pr1
               (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
                  (pr2 W))),
    pr1
      (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
         smash_product_monoidal_data W X Z (f₁ · f₂))
      c =
    pr1
      (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
         smash_product_monoidal_data W X Y f₁
       · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
           smash_product_monoidal_data W Y Z f₂) c) x)

        apply setproperty.
      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
W, X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
f₁: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ X, Y ⟧
f₂: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
∏ x : pr1 X × pr1 W,
(λ c : setquot
         (pr1
            (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
               (pr2 W))),
 pr1
   (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
      smash_product_monoidal_data W X Z (f₁ · f₂)) c =
 pr1
   (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
      smash_product_monoidal_data W X Y f₁
    · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
        smash_product_monoidal_data W Y Z f₂) c)
  (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 W)) x)

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
W, X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
f₁: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ X, Y ⟧
f₂: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
x: pr1 X × pr1 W
(λ c : setquot
         (pr1
            (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
               (pr2 W))),
 pr1
   (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
      smash_product_monoidal_data W X Z (f₁ · f₂)) c =
 pr1
   (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
      smash_product_monoidal_data W X Y f₁
    · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
        smash_product_monoidal_data W Y Z f₂) c)
  (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 W)) x)

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
W, X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
f₁: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ X, Y ⟧
f₂: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
x: pr1 X × pr1 W
smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Z) (pr2 W)
  (pr1 (f₁ · f₂)
     (pr11 (x,,
            eqrelrefl
              (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
                 (pr2 W)) x)),,
   pr21 (x,,
         eqrelrefl
           (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
              (pr2 W)) x))
  (pr1 f₂
     (pr11 ((pr1 f₁
               (pr11 (x,,
                      eqrelrefl
                        (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                           (pr2 X) (pr2 W)) x)),,
             pr21 (x,,
                   eqrelrefl
                     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                        (pr2 X) (pr2 W)) x)),,
            eqrelrefl
              (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y)
                 (pr2 W))
              (pr1 f₁
                 (pr11 (x,,
                        eqrelrefl
                          (smash_eqrel (pr1 P)
                             (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 W))
                          x)),,
               pr21 (x,,
                     eqrelrefl
                       (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                          (pr2 X) (pr2 W)) x)))),,
   pr21 ((pr1 f₁
            (pr11 (x,,
                   eqrelrefl
                     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                        (pr2 X) (pr2 W)) x)),,
          pr21 (x,,
                eqrelrefl
                  (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                     (pr2 X) (pr2 W)) x)),,
         eqrelrefl
           (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y)
              (pr2 W))
           (pr1 f₁
              (pr11 (x,,
                     eqrelrefl
                       (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                          (pr2 X) (pr2 W)) x)),,
            pr21 (x,,
                  eqrelrefl
                    (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                       (pr2 X) (pr2 W)) x))))

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
W, X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
f₁: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ X, Y ⟧
f₂: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
x: pr1 X × pr1 W
(pr1 f₂ (pr1 f₁ (pr1 x)),, pr2 x =
 pr1 f₂ (pr1 f₁ (pr1 x)),, pr2 x)
⨿ (product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Z)
     (pr2 W) (pr1 f₂ (pr1 f₁ (pr1 x)),, pr2 x)
   × product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Z)
       (pr2 W) (pr1 f₂ (pr1 f₁ (pr1 x)),, pr2 x))

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
W, X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
f₁: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ X, Y ⟧
f₂: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
x: pr1 X × pr1 W
pr1 f₂ (pr1 f₁ (pr1 x)),, pr2 x =
pr1 f₂ (pr1 f₁ (pr1 x)),, pr2 x

      apply idpath.
    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
functoronmorphisms_are_equal
  smash_product_monoidal_data
 
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂: category_of_hset_struct P
f: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ X₁, X₂ ⟧
g: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ Y₁, Y₂ ⟧
functoronmorphisms1 smash_product_monoidal_data f g =
functoronmorphisms2 smash_product_monoidal_data f g

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂: category_of_hset_struct P
f: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ X₁, X₂ ⟧
g: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ Y₁, Y₂ ⟧
∏
x : pr11 (bifunctor_on_objects
            smash_product_monoidal_data X₁ Y₁),
pr1
  (functoronmorphisms1 smash_product_monoidal_data f g)
  x =
pr1
  (functoronmorphisms2 smash_product_monoidal_data f g)
  x

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂: category_of_hset_struct P
f: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ X₁, X₂ ⟧
g: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ Y₁, Y₂ ⟧
∏
x : setquot
      (pr1
         (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X₁)
            (pr2 Y₁))),
isaprop
  ((λ c : setquot
            (pr1
               (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X₁)
                  (pr2 Y₁))),
    pr1
      (functoronmorphisms1 smash_product_monoidal_data
         f g) c =
    pr1
      (functoronmorphisms2 smash_product_monoidal_data
         f g) c) x)
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂: category_of_hset_struct P
f: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ X₁, X₂ ⟧
g: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ Y₁, Y₂ ⟧
∏ x : pr1 X₁ × pr1 Y₁,
(λ c : setquot
         (pr1
            (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X₁)
               (pr2 Y₁))),
 pr1
   (functoronmorphisms1 smash_product_monoidal_data f
      g) c =
 pr1
   (functoronmorphisms2 smash_product_monoidal_data f
      g) c)
  (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X₁) (pr2 Y₁))
     x)

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed

f: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ X₁, X₂ ⟧
g: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ Y₁, Y₂ ⟧
∏
x : setquot
      (pr1
         (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X₁)
            (pr2 Y₁))),
isaprop
  ((λ c : setquot
            (pr1
               (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X₁)
                  (pr2 Y₁))),
    pr1
      (functoronmorphisms1 smash_product_monoidal_data
         f g) c =
    pr1
      (functoronmorphisms2 smash_product_monoidal_data
         f g) c) x)

        
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂: category_of_hset_struct P
f: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ X₁, X₂ ⟧
g: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ Y₁, Y₂ ⟧
x: setquot
  (pr1
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X₁)
        (pr2 Y₁)))
isaprop
  ((λ c : setquot
            (pr1
               (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X₁)
                  (pr2 Y₁))),
    pr1
      (functoronmorphisms1 smash_product_monoidal_data
         f g) c =
    pr1
      (functoronmorphisms2 smash_product_monoidal_data
         f g) c) x)

        apply setproperty.
      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂: category_of_hset_struct P
f: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ X₁, X₂ ⟧
g: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ Y₁, Y₂ ⟧
∏ x : pr1 X₁ × pr1 Y₁,
(λ c : setquot
         (pr1
            (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X₁)
               (pr2 Y₁))),
 pr1
   (functoronmorphisms1 smash_product_monoidal_data f
      g) c =
 pr1
   (functoronmorphisms2 smash_product_monoidal_data f
      g) c)
  (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X₁) (pr2 Y₁))
     x)

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂: category_of_hset_struct P
f: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ X₁, X₂ ⟧
g: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ Y₁, Y₂ ⟧
x: pr1 X₁ × pr1 Y₁
(λ c : setquot
         (pr1
            (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X₁)
               (pr2 Y₁))),
 pr1
   (functoronmorphisms1 smash_product_monoidal_data f
      g) c =
 pr1
   (functoronmorphisms2 smash_product_monoidal_data f
      g) c)
  (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X₁) (pr2 Y₁))
     x)

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂: category_of_hset_struct P
f: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ X₁, X₂ ⟧
g: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ Y₁, Y₂ ⟧
x: pr1 X₁ × pr1 Y₁
smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X₂) (pr2 Y₂)
  (pr11 ((pr1 f
            (pr11 (x,,
                   eqrelrefl
                     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                        (pr2 X₁) (pr2 Y₁)) x)),,
          pr21 (x,,
                eqrelrefl
                  (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                     (pr2 X₁) (pr2 Y₁)) x)),,
         eqrelrefl
           (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X₂)
              (pr2 Y₁))
           (pr1 f
              (pr11 (x,,
                     eqrelrefl
                       (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                          (pr2 X₁) (pr2 Y₁)) x)),,
            pr21 (x,,
                  eqrelrefl
                    (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                       (pr2 X₁) (pr2 Y₁)) x))),,
   pr1 g
     (pr21 ((pr1 f
               (pr11 (x,,
                      eqrelrefl
                        (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                           (pr2 X₁) (pr2 Y₁)) x)),,
             pr21 (x,,
                   eqrelrefl
                     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                        (pr2 X₁) (pr2 Y₁)) x)),,
            eqrelrefl
              (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X₂)
                 (pr2 Y₁))
              (pr1 f
                 (pr11 (x,,
                        eqrelrefl
                          (smash_eqrel (pr1 P)
                             (pr12 P) (pr2 X₁)
                             (pr2 Y₁)) x)),,
               pr21 (x,,
                     eqrelrefl
                       (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                          (pr2 X₁) (pr2 Y₁)) x)))))
  (pr1 f
     (pr11 ((pr11 (x,,
                   eqrelrefl
                     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                        (pr2 X₁) (pr2 Y₁)) x),,
             pr1 g
               (pr21 (x,,
                      eqrelrefl
                        (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                           (pr2 X₁) (pr2 Y₁)) x))),,
            eqrelrefl
              (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X₁)
                 (pr2 Y₂))
              (pr11 (x,,
                     eqrelrefl
                       (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                          (pr2 X₁) (pr2 Y₁)) x),,
               pr1 g
                 (pr21 (x,,
                        eqrelrefl
                          (smash_eqrel (pr1 P)
                             (pr12 P) (pr2 X₁)
                             (pr2 Y₁)) x))))),,
   pr21 ((pr11 (x,,
                eqrelrefl
                  (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                     (pr2 X₁) (pr2 Y₁)) x),,
          pr1 g
            (pr21 (x,,
                   eqrelrefl
                     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                        (pr2 X₁) (pr2 Y₁)) x))),,
         eqrelrefl
           (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X₁)
              (pr2 Y₂))
           (pr11 (x,,
                  eqrelrefl
                    (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                       (pr2 X₁) (pr2 Y₁)) x),,
            pr1 g
              (pr21 (x,,
                     eqrelrefl
                       (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                          (pr2 X₁) (pr2 Y₁)) x)))))

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂: category_of_hset_struct P
f: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ X₁, X₂ ⟧
g: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ Y₁, Y₂ ⟧
x: pr1 X₁ × pr1 Y₁
(pr1 f (pr1 x),, pr1 g (pr2 x) =
 pr1 f (pr1 x),, pr1 g (pr2 x))
⨿ (product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X₂)
     (pr2 Y₂) (pr1 f (pr1 x),, pr1 g (pr2 x))
   × product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
       (pr2 X₂) (pr2 Y₂)
       (pr1 f (pr1 x),, pr1 g (pr2 x)))

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂: category_of_hset_struct P
f: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ X₁, X₂ ⟧
g: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ Y₁, Y₂ ⟧
x: pr1 X₁ × pr1 Y₁
pr1 f (pr1 x),, pr1 g (pr2 x) =
pr1 f (pr1 x),, pr1 g (pr2 x)

      apply idpath.
    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
leftunitor_nat
  (monoidal_leftunitordata smash_product_monoidal_data)
 
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y: category_of_hset_struct P
f: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ X, Y ⟧
leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
  smash_product_monoidal_data
  (monoidal_unit smash_product_monoidal_data) X Y f
· monoidal_leftunitordata smash_product_monoidal_data
    Y =
monoidal_leftunitordata smash_product_monoidal_data X
· f

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y: category_of_hset_struct P
f: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ X, Y ⟧
∏

P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z₁, Z₂: category_of_hset_struct P
h: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ Z₁, Z₂ ⟧
monoidal_associatordata smash_product_monoidal_data X
  Y Z₁
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
    smash_product_monoidal_data X
    (bifunctor_on_objects smash_product_monoidal_data
       Y Z₁)
    (bifunctor_on_objects smash_product_monoidal_data
       Y Z₂)
    (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
       smash_product_monoidal_data Y Z₁ Z₂ h) =
leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
  smash_product_monoidal_data
  (bifunctor_on_objects smash_product_monoidal_data X
     Y) Z₁ Z₂ h
· monoidal_associatordata smash_product_monoidal_data
    X Y Z₂

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z₁, Z₂: category_of_hset_struct P
h: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ Z₁, Z₂ ⟧
∏
x : pr11 (bifunctor_on_objects
            smash_product_monoidal_data
            (bifunctor_on_objects
               smash_product_monoidal_data X Y) Z₁),
pr1
  (monoidal_associatordata smash_product_monoidal_data
     X Y Z₁
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
       smash_product_monoidal_data X
       (bifunctor_on_objects
          smash_product_monoidal_data Y Z₁)
       (bifunctor_on_objects
          smash_product_monoidal_data Y Z₂)
       (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
          smash_product_monoidal_data Y Z₁ Z₂ h)) x =
pr1
  (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
     smash_product_monoidal_data
     (bifunctor_on_objects smash_product_monoidal_data
        X Y) Z₁ Z₂ h
   · monoidal_associatordata
       smash_product_monoidal_data X Y Z₂) x

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z₁, Z₂: category_of_hset_struct P
h: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ Z₁, Z₂ ⟧
∏
x : setquot
      (pr1
         (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
            (pr2
               (bifunctor_on_objects
                  smash_product_monoidal_data X Y))
            (pr2 Z₁))),
isaprop
  ((λ c : setquot
            (pr1
               (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                  (pr2
                     (bifunctor_on_objects
                        smash_product_monoidal_data X
                        Y)) (pr2 Z₁))),
    pr1
      (monoidal_associatordata
         smash_product_monoidal_data X Y Z₁
       · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
           smash_product_monoidal_data X
           (bifunctor_on_objects
              smash_product_monoidal_data Y Z₁)
           (bifunctor_on_objects
              smash_product_monoidal_data Y Z₂)
           (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
              smash_product_monoidal_data Y Z₁ Z₂ h))
      c =
    pr1
      (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
         smash_product_monoidal_data
         (bifunctor_on_objects
            smash_product_monoidal_data X Y) Z₁ Z₂ h
       · monoidal_associatordata
           smash_product_monoidal_data X Y Z₂) c) x)

(λ c : setquot
         (pr1
            (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
               (pr2
                  (bifunctor_on_objects
                     smash_product_monoidal_data X Y))
               (pr2 Z₁))),
 pr1

    · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms

         smash_product_monoidal_data X Y) Z₁ Z₂ h
    · monoidal_associatordata
        smash_product_monoidal_data X Y Z₂) c)
  (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
        (pr2
           (bifunctor_on_objects
              smash_product_monoidal_data X Y))
        (pr2 Z₁)) x)

y: pr1 Z₁
x₁: pr1 X
x₂: pr1 Y
pr1
  (monoidal_associatordata smash_product_monoidal_data
     X Y Z₁
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
       smash_product_monoidal_data X
       (bifunctor_on_objects
          smash_product_monoidal_data Y Z₁)
       (bifunctor_on_objects
          smash_product_monoidal_data Y Z₂)

              smash_product_monoidal_data X Y))
        (pr2 Z₁))
     (setquotpr
        (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))
        (x₁,, x₂),, y)) =
pr1
  (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
     smash_product_monoidal_data
     (bifunctor_on_objects smash_product_monoidal_data
        X Y) Z₁ Z₂ h
   · monoidal_associatordata
       smash_product_monoidal_data X Y Z₂)

        (pr2
           (bifunctor_on_objects
              smash_product_monoidal_data X Y))
        (pr2 Z₁))
     (setquotpr

        (x₁,, x₂),, y))

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z₁, Z₂: category_of_hset_struct P
h: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ Z₁, Z₂ ⟧
y: pr1 Z₁
x₁: pr1 X
x₂: pr1 Y
ishinh_UU
  ((x₁,,
    setquotpr
      (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z₂))
      (x₂,, pr1 h y) =
    x₁,,
    setquotpr
      (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z₂))
      (x₂,, pr1 h y))
   ⨿ (product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
        (pr2 X)
        ((pr122 P) (pr1 Y) (pr1 Z₂) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z₂))
        (x₁,,
         setquotpr
           (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y)
              (pr2 Z₂)) (x₂,, pr1 h y))
      × product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
          (pr2 X)
          ((pr122 P) (pr1 Y) (pr1 Z₂) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z₂))
          (x₁,,
           setquotpr
             (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y)
                (pr2 Z₂)) (x₂,, pr1 h y))))

P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X₁, X₂, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
f: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ X₁, X₂ ⟧
monoidal_associatordata smash_product_monoidal_data X₁
  Y Z
· rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
    smash_product_monoidal_data
    (bifunctor_on_objects smash_product_monoidal_data
       Y Z) X₁ X₂ f =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
  smash_product_monoidal_data Z
  (bifunctor_on_objects smash_product_monoidal_data X₁
     Y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects smash_product_monoidal_data X₂
     Y)
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
     smash_product_monoidal_data Y X₁ X₂ f)
· monoidal_associatordata smash_product_monoidal_data
    X₂ Y Z

     (bifunctor_on_objects smash_product_monoidal_data
        X₁ Y)
     (bifunctor_on_objects smash_product_monoidal_data
        X₂ Y)
     (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
        smash_product_monoidal_data Y X₁ X₂ f)
   · monoidal_associatordata

     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X₁) (pr2 Y)) x)

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X₁, X₂, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
f: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ X₁, X₂ ⟧
y: pr1 Z
xx: pr1 X₁ × pr1 Y
(λ c : setquot
         (pr1
            (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X₁)
               (pr2 Y))),
 pr1
   (monoidal_associatordata
      smash_product_monoidal_data X₁ Y Z
    · rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
        smash_product_monoidal_data
        (bifunctor_on_objects
           smash_product_monoidal_data Y Z) X₁ X₂ f)
   (setquotpr
      (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
         (pr2
            (bifunctor_on_objects
               smash_product_monoidal_data X₁ Y))
         (pr2 Z)) (c,, y)) =
 pr1
   (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
      smash_product_monoidal_data Z
      (bifunctor_on_objects
         smash_product_monoidal_data X₁ Y)
      (bifunctor_on_objects
         smash_product_monoidal_data X₂ Y)
      (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
         smash_product_monoidal_data Y X₁ X₂ f)
    · monoidal_associatordata
        smash_product_monoidal_data X₂ Y Z)
   (setquotpr
      (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
         (pr2
            (bifunctor_on_objects
               smash_product_monoidal_data X₁ Y))
         (pr2 Z)) (c,, y)))
  (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X₁) (pr2 Y))
     xx)

f: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ X₁, X₂ ⟧

x₁: pr1 X₁
x₂: pr1 Y
pr1
  (monoidal_associatordata smash_product_monoidal_data
     X₁ Y Z

       (bifunctor_on_objects

        (pr2 Z))

        (x₁,, x₂),, y)) =

        X₁ Y)
     (bifunctor_on_objects smash_product_monoidal_data
        X₂ Y)
     (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
        smash_product_monoidal_data Y X₁ X₂ f)
   · monoidal_associatordata
       smash_product_monoidal_data X₂ Y Z)
  (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
        (pr2
           (bifunctor_on_objects
              smash_product_monoidal_data X₁ Y))
        (pr2 Z))
     (setquotpr
        (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X₁) (pr2 Y))
        (x₁,, x₂),, y))

P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y₁, Y₂, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
g: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ Y₁, Y₂ ⟧
monoidal_associatordata smash_product_monoidal_data X
  Y₁ Z
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
    smash_product_monoidal_data X
    (bifunctor_on_objects smash_product_monoidal_data
       Y₁ Z)
    (bifunctor_on_objects smash_product_monoidal_data
       Y₂ Z)
    (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
       smash_product_monoidal_data Z Y₁ Y₂ g) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
  smash_product_monoidal_data Z
  (bifunctor_on_objects smash_product_monoidal_data X
     Y₁)
  (bifunctor_on_objects smash_product_monoidal_data X
     Y₂)
  (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
     smash_product_monoidal_data X Y₁ Y₂ g)
· monoidal_associatordata smash_product_monoidal_data
    X Y₂ Z

X, Y₁, Y₂, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
g: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ Y₁, Y₂ ⟧
∏
x : pr11 (bifunctor_on_objects
            smash_product_monoidal_data
            (bifunctor_on_objects
               smash_product_monoidal_data X Y₁) Z),
pr1
  (monoidal_associatordata smash_product_monoidal_data
     X Y₁ Z
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
       smash_product_monoidal_data X
       (bifunctor_on_objects
          smash_product_monoidal_data Y₁ Z)
       (bifunctor_on_objects
          smash_product_monoidal_data Y₂ Z)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
          smash_product_monoidal_data Z Y₁ Y₂ g)) x =
pr1
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
     smash_product_monoidal_data Z
     (bifunctor_on_objects smash_product_monoidal_data
        X Y₁)
     (bifunctor_on_objects smash_product_monoidal_data
        X Y₂)
     (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
        smash_product_monoidal_data X Y₁ Y₂ g)
   · monoidal_associatordata
       smash_product_monoidal_data X Y₂ Z) x

P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y₁, Y₂, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
g: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ Y₁, Y₂ ⟧
y: pr1 Z
∏ x : pr1 X × pr1 Y₁,
(λ c : setquot
         (pr1
            (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
               (pr2 Y₁))),
 pr1
   (monoidal_associatordata
      smash_product_monoidal_data X Y₁ Z
    · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
        smash_product_monoidal_data X
        (bifunctor_on_objects
           smash_product_monoidal_data Y₁ Z)
        (bifunctor_on_objects
           smash_product_monoidal_data Y₂ Z)
        (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
           smash_product_monoidal_data Z Y₁ Y₂ g))
   (setquotpr
      (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
         (pr2
            (bifunctor_on_objects
               smash_product_monoidal_data X Y₁))
         (pr2 Z)) (c,, y)) =
 pr1
   (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
      smash_product_monoidal_data Z
      (bifunctor_on_objects
         smash_product_monoidal_data X Y₁)
      (bifunctor_on_objects
         smash_product_monoidal_data X Y₂)
      (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
         smash_product_monoidal_data X Y₁ Y₂ g)
    · monoidal_associatordata
        smash_product_monoidal_data X Y₂ Z)
   (setquotpr
      (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
         (pr2
            (bifunctor_on_objects
               smash_product_monoidal_data X Y₁))
         (pr2 Z)) (c,, y)))
  (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y₁)) x)

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y₁, Y₂, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
g: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ Y₁, Y₂ ⟧
y: pr1 Z
∏
x : setquot
      (pr1
         (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
            (pr2 Y₁))),
isaprop
  ((λ c : setquot
            (pr1
               (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
                  (pr2 Y₁))),
    pr1
      (monoidal_associatordata

       · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms

           (bifunctor_on_objects
              smash_product_monoidal_data Y₁ Z)
           (bifunctor_on_objects
              smash_product_monoidal_data Y₂ Z)
           (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms

      (setquotpr
         (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
            (pr2
               (bifunctor_on_objects
                  smash_product_monoidal_data X Y₁))
            (pr2 Z)) (c,, y)) =
    pr1
      (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
         smash_product_monoidal_data Z
         (bifunctor_on_objects
            smash_product_monoidal_data X Y₁)
         (bifunctor_on_objects
            smash_product_monoidal_data X Y₂)
         (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
            smash_product_monoidal_data X Y₁ Y₂ g)
       · monoidal_associatordata
           smash_product_monoidal_data X Y₂ Z)
      (setquotpr
         (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
            (pr2
               (bifunctor_on_objects
                  smash_product_monoidal_data X Y₁))
            (pr2 Z)) (c,, y))) x)

isaprop

    pr1
      (monoidal_associatordata

       · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms

           (bifunctor_on_objects
              smash_product_monoidal_data Y₁ Z)
           (bifunctor_on_objects
              smash_product_monoidal_data Y₂ Z)

         (bifunctor_on_objects

       · monoidal_associatordata

            (pr2

        apply setproperty.

P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y₁, Y₂, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
g: category_of_hset_struct P ⟦ Y₁, Y₂ ⟧
y: pr1 Z
x₁: pr1 X
x₂: pr1 Y₁
pr1
  (monoidal_associatordata smash_product_monoidal_data
     X Y₁ Z
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
       smash_product_monoidal_data X
       (bifunctor_on_objects
          smash_product_monoidal_data Y₁ Z)
       (bifunctor_on_objects
          smash_product_monoidal_data Y₂ Z)
       (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
          smash_product_monoidal_data Z Y₁ Y₂ g))
  (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
        (pr2
           (bifunctor_on_objects
              smash_product_monoidal_data X Y₁))
        (pr2 Z))
     (setquotpr
        (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y₁))
        (x₁,, x₂),, y)) =
pr1
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
     smash_product_monoidal_data Z
     (bifunctor_on_objects smash_product_monoidal_data
        X Y₁)
     (bifunctor_on_objects smash_product_monoidal_data
        X Y₂)
     (leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
        smash_product_monoidal_data X Y₁ Y₂ g)
   · monoidal_associatordata
       smash_product_monoidal_data X Y₂ Z)
  (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
        (pr2
           (bifunctor_on_objects
              smash_product_monoidal_data X Y₁))
        (pr2 Z))
     (setquotpr
        (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y₁))
        (x₁,, x₂),, y))

ishinh_UU
  ((x₁,,
    setquotpr

      (pr1 g x₂,, y) =
    x₁,,
    setquotpr
      (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y₂) (pr2 Z))
      (pr1 g x₂,, y))
   ⨿ (product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
        (pr2 X)
        ((pr122 P) (pr1 Y₂) (pr1 Z) (pr2 Y₂) (pr2 Z))
        (x₁,,
         setquotpr
           (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y₂)
              (pr2 Z)) (pr1 g x₂,, y))
      × product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
          (pr2 X)
          ((pr122 P) (pr1 Y₂) (pr1 Z) (pr2 Y₂) (pr2 Z))
          (x₁,,
           setquotpr
             (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y₂)
                (pr2 Z)) (pr1 g x₂,, y))))

P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
x, y, z: category_of_hset_struct P
monoidal_associatordata smash_product_monoidal_data x
  y z
· monoidal_associatorinvdata
    smash_product_monoidal_data x y z =
identity
  (bifunctor_on_objects smash_product_monoidal_data
     (bifunctor_on_objects smash_product_monoidal_data
        x y) z)

            (pr2 z)) (c,, z'))) x0)

P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
x, y, z: category_of_hset_struct P
z': pr1 z
x': pr1 x
y': pr1 y
smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
  (pr2
     (bifunctor_on_objects smash_product_monoidal_data
        x y)) (pr2 z)
  (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 x) (pr2 y))
     (pr11 ((pr11 ((x',, y'),,
                   eqrelrefl
                     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                        (pr2 x) (pr2 y)) (x',, y')),,
             setquotpr
               (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 y)
                  (pr2 z))
               (pr21 ((x',, y'),,
                      eqrelrefl
                        (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                           (pr2 x) (pr2 y)) (x',, y')),,
                pr21 ((setquotpr
                         (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                            (pr2 x) (pr2 y)) (x',, y'),,
                       z'),,
                      eqrelrefl
                        (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                           (pr2
                              (bifunctor_on_objects
                                 smash_product_monoidal_data
                                 x y)) (pr2 z))
                        (setquotpr
                           (smash_eqrel (pr1 P)
                              (pr12 P) (pr2 x) (pr2 y))
                           (x',, y'),, z')))),,
            eqrelrefl
              (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 x)
                 (pr2 (y ∧* z)))
              (pr11 ((x',, y'),,
                     eqrelrefl
                       (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                          (pr2 x) (pr2 y)) (x',, y')),,
               setquotpr
                 (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 y)
                    (pr2 z))
                 (pr21 ((x',, y'),,
                        eqrelrefl
                          (smash_eqrel (pr1 P)
                             (pr12 P) (pr2 x) (pr2 y))
                          (x',, y')),,
                  pr21 ((setquotpr
                           (smash_eqrel (pr1 P)
                              (pr12 P) (pr2 x) (pr2 y))
                           (x',, y'),, z'),,
                        eqrelrefl
                          (smash_eqrel (pr1 P)
                             (pr12 P)
                             (pr2
                                (bifunctor_on_objects
                                   smash_product_monoidal_data
                                   x y)) (pr2 z))
                          (setquotpr
                             (smash_eqrel (pr1 P)
                                (pr12 P) (pr2 x)
                                (pr2 y)) (x',, y'),,
                           z'))))),,
      pr11 ((pr21 ((x',, y'),,
                   eqrelrefl
                     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                        (pr2 x) (pr2 y)) (x',, y')),,
             pr21 ((setquotpr
                      (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                         (pr2 x) (pr2 y)) (x',, y'),,
                    z'),,
                   eqrelrefl
                     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                        (pr2
                           (bifunctor_on_objects
                              smash_product_monoidal_data
                              x y)) (pr2 z))
                     (setquotpr
                        (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                           (pr2 x) (pr2 y)) (x',, y'),,
                      z'))),,
            eqrelrefl
              (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 y)
                 (pr2 z))
              (pr21 ((x',, y'),,
                     eqrelrefl
                       (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                          (pr2 x) (pr2 y)) (x',, y')),,
               pr21 ((setquotpr
                        (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                           (pr2 x) (pr2 y)) (x',, y'),,
                      z'),,
                     eqrelrefl
                       (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                          (pr2
                             (bifunctor_on_objects
                                smash_product_monoidal_data
                                x y)) (pr2 z))
                       (setquotpr
                          (smash_eqrel (pr1 P)
                             (pr12 P) (pr2 x) (pr2 y))
                          (x',, y'),, z'))))),,
   pr21 ((pr21 ((x',, y'),,
                eqrelrefl
                  (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                     (pr2 x) (pr2 y)) (x',, y')),,
          pr21 ((setquotpr
                   (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                      (pr2 x) (pr2 y)) (x',, y'),, z'),,
                eqrelrefl
                  (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                     (pr2
                        (bifunctor_on_objects
                           smash_product_monoidal_data
                           x y)) (pr2 z))
                  (setquotpr
                     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                        (pr2 x) (pr2 y)) (x',, y'),,
                   z'))),,
         eqrelrefl
           (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 y)
              (pr2 z))
           (pr21 ((x',, y'),,
                  eqrelrefl
                    (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                       (pr2 x) (pr2 y)) (x',, y')),,
            pr21 ((setquotpr
                     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                        (pr2 x) (pr2 y)) (x',, y'),,
                   z'),,
                  eqrelrefl
                    (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                       (pr2
                          (bifunctor_on_objects
                             smash_product_monoidal_data
                             x y)) (pr2 z))
                    (setquotpr
                       (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                          (pr2 x) (pr2 y)) (x',, y'),,
                     z')))))
  (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 x) (pr2 y))
     (x',, y'),, z')

z': pr1 z
x': pr1 x
y': pr1 y
(setquotpr

   (x',, y'),, z' =

   (x',, y'),, z')
⨿ (product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P)

identity

        y z))

               (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 y)
                  (pr2 z))),
    pr1
      (monoidal_associatorinvdata
         smash_product_monoidal_data x y z
       · monoidal_associatordata
           smash_product_monoidal_data x y z)
      (setquotpr
         (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 x)
            (pr2
               (bifunctor_on_objects
                  smash_product_monoidal_data y z)))
         (x',, c)) =
    pr1
      (identity
         (bifunctor_on_objects
            smash_product_monoidal_data x
            (bifunctor_on_objects
               smash_product_monoidal_data y z)))
      (setquotpr
         (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 x)
            (pr2
               (bifunctor_on_objects
                  smash_product_monoidal_data y z)))
         (x',, c))) x0)

x, y, z: category_of_hset_struct P
x': pr1 x
y': pr1 y
z': pr1 z
pr1
  (monoidal_associatorinvdata
     smash_product_monoidal_data x y z
   · monoidal_associatordata
       smash_product_monoidal_data x y z)
  (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 x)

              smash_product_monoidal_data y z)))

        (y',, z'))) =

        x
        (bifunctor_on_objects
           smash_product_monoidal_data y z)))

        (pr2

              smash_product_monoidal_data y z)))
     (x',,
      setquotpr
        (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 y) (pr2 z))
        (y',, z')))

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
x, y, z: category_of_hset_struct P
x': pr1 x
y': pr1 y
z': pr1 z
smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 x)
  (pr2
     (bifunctor_on_objects smash_product_monoidal_data
        y z))
  (pr11 ((pr11 ((x',,
                 setquotpr
                   (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                      (pr2 y) (pr2 z)) (y',, z')),,
                eqrelrefl
                  (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                     (pr2 x)
                     (pr2
                        (bifunctor_on_objects
                           smash_product_monoidal_data
                           y z)))
                  (x',,
                   setquotpr
                     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                        (pr2 y) (pr2 z)) (y',, z'))),,
          pr11 ((y',, z'),,
                eqrelrefl
                  (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                     (pr2 y) (pr2 z)) (y',, z'))),,
         eqrelrefl
           (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 x)
              (pr2 y))
           (pr11 ((x',,
                   setquotpr
                     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                        (pr2 y) (pr2 z)) (y',, z')),,
                  eqrelrefl
                    (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                       (pr2 x)
                       (pr2
                          (bifunctor_on_objects
                             smash_product_monoidal_data
                             y z)))
                    (x',,
                     setquotpr
                       (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                          (pr2 y) (pr2 z)) (y',, z'))),,
            pr11 ((y',, z'),,
                  eqrelrefl
                    (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                       (pr2 y) (pr2 z)) (y',, z')))),,
   setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 y) (pr2 z))
     (pr21 ((pr11 ((x',,
                    setquotpr
                      (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                         (pr2 y) (pr2 z)) (y',, z')),,
                   eqrelrefl
                     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                        (pr2 x)
                        (pr2
                           (bifunctor_on_objects
                              smash_product_monoidal_data
                              y z)))
                     (x',,
                      setquotpr
                        (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                           (pr2 y) (pr2 z)) (y',, z'))),,
             pr11 ((y',, z'),,
                   eqrelrefl
                     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                        (pr2 y) (pr2 z)) (y',, z'))),,
            eqrelrefl
              (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 x)
                 (pr2 y))
              (pr11 ((x',,
                      setquotpr
                        (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                           (pr2 y) (pr2 z)) (y',, z')),,
                     eqrelrefl
                       (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                          (pr2 x)
                          (pr2
                             (bifunctor_on_objects
                                smash_product_monoidal_data
                                y z)))
                       (x',,
                        setquotpr
                          (smash_eqrel (pr1 P)
                             (pr12 P) (pr2 y) (pr2 z))
                          (y',, z'))),,
               pr11 ((y',, z'),,
                     eqrelrefl
                       (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                          (pr2 y) (pr2 z)) (y',, z')))),,
      pr21 ((setquotpr
               (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 x)
                  (pr2 y))
               (pr11 ((x',,
                       setquotpr
                         (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                            (pr2 y) (pr2 z)) (y',, z')),,
                      eqrelrefl
                        (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                           (pr2 x)
                           (pr2
                              (bifunctor_on_objects
                                 smash_product_monoidal_data
                                 y z)))
                        (x',,
                         setquotpr
                           (smash_eqrel (pr1 P)
                              (pr12 P) (pr2 y) (pr2 z))
                           (y',, z'))),,
                pr11 ((y',, z'),,
                      eqrelrefl
                        (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                           (pr2 y) (pr2 z)) (y',, z'))),,
             pr21 ((y',, z'),,
                   eqrelrefl
                     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                        (pr2 y) (pr2 z)) (y',, z'))),,
            eqrelrefl
              (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                 (pr2 (x ∧* y)) (pr2 z))
              (setquotpr
                 (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 x)
                    (pr2 y))
                 (pr11 ((x',,
                         setquotpr
                           (smash_eqrel (pr1 P)
                              (pr12 P) (pr2 y) (pr2 z))
                           (y',, z')),,
                        eqrelrefl
                          (smash_eqrel (pr1 P)
                             (pr12 P) (pr2 x)
                             (pr2
                                (bifunctor_on_objects
                                   smash_product_monoidal_data
                                   y z)))
                          (x',,
                           setquotpr
                             (smash_eqrel (pr1 P)
                                (pr12 P) (pr2 y)
                                (pr2 z)) (y',, z'))),,
                  pr11 ((y',, z'),,
                        eqrelrefl
                          (smash_eqrel (pr1 P)
                             (pr12 P) (pr2 y) (pr2 z))
                          (y',, z'))),,
               pr21 ((y',, z'),,
                     eqrelrefl
                       (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                          (pr2 y) (pr2 z)) (y',, z'))))))
  (x',,
   setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 y) (pr2 z))
     (y',, z'))

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
x, y, z: category_of_hset_struct P
x': pr1 x
y': pr1 y
z': pr1 z
(x',,
 setquotpr
   (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 y) (pr2 z))
   (y',, z') =
 x',,
 setquotpr
   (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 y) (pr2 z))
   (y',, z'))
⨿ (product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 x)
     ((pr122 P) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y) (pr2 z))
     (x',,
      setquotpr
        (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 y) (pr2 z))
        (y',, z'))
   × product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 x)
       ((pr122 P) (pr1 y) (pr1 z) (pr2 y) (pr2 z))
       (x',,
        setquotpr
          (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 y)
             (pr2 z)) (y',, z')))

z': pr1 z

setquotpr
  (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 y) (pr2 z))
  (y',, z') =
x',,
setquotpr
  (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 y) (pr2 z))
  (y',, z')

      apply idpath.
    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
triangle_identity
  (monoidal_leftunitordata smash_product_monoidal_data)
  (monoidal_rightunitordata
     smash_product_monoidal_data)
  (monoidal_associatordata smash_product_monoidal_data)
 
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y: category_of_hset_struct P
monoidal_associatordata smash_product_monoidal_data X
  (monoidal_unit smash_product_monoidal_data) Y
· leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
    smash_product_monoidal_data X
    (bifunctor_on_objects smash_product_monoidal_data
       (monoidal_unit smash_product_monoidal_data) Y)
    Y
    (monoidal_leftunitordata
       smash_product_monoidal_data Y) =
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
  smash_product_monoidal_data Y
  (bifunctor_on_objects smash_product_monoidal_data X
     (monoidal_unit smash_product_monoidal_data)) X
  (monoidal_rightunitordata
     smash_product_monoidal_data X)

∏

            smash_product_monoidal_data

     X (monoidal_unit smash_product_monoidal_data) Y

       smash_product_monoidal_data X

          smash_product_monoidal_data
          (monoidal_unit smash_product_monoidal_data)
          Y) Y
       (monoidal_leftunitordata
          smash_product_monoidal_data Y)) x =
pr1
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
     smash_product_monoidal_data Y
     (bifunctor_on_objects smash_product_monoidal_data
        X (monoidal_unit smash_product_monoidal_data))
     X
     (monoidal_rightunitordata
        smash_product_monoidal_data X)) x

  (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
        (pr2
           (bifunctor_on_objects
              smash_product_monoidal_data X
              (monoidal_unit
                 smash_product_monoidal_data)))
        (pr2 Y)) x)

  (monoidal_associatordata smash_product_monoidal_data

   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
       smash_product_monoidal_data X

X, Y: category_of_hset_struct P
y: pr1 Y
x: pr1 X
b: pr1 (monoidal_unit smash_product_monoidal_data)
ishinh_UU
  ((x,, (if b then y else hset_struct_point P (pr2 Y)) =
    (if b then x else hset_struct_point P (pr2 X)),, y)
   ⨿ (product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
        (pr2 X) (pr2 Y)
        (x,,
         (if b then y else hset_struct_point P (pr2 Y)))
      × product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
          (pr2 X) (pr2 Y)
          ((if b
            then x
            else hset_struct_point P (pr2 X)),, y)))

y: pr1 Y
x: pr1 X
b: pr1 (monoidal_unit smash_product_monoidal_data)
(x,, (if b then y else hset_struct_point P (pr2 Y)) =
 (if b then x else hset_struct_point P (pr2 X)),, y)
⨿ (product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
     (pr2 Y)
     (x,,
      (if b then y else hset_struct_point P (pr2 Y)))
   × product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
       (pr2 Y)
       ((if b then x else hset_struct_point P (pr2 X)),,
        y))

x: pr1 X
(x,, y = x,, y)

X, Y: category_of_hset_struct P
y: pr1 Y
x: pr1 X
(x,, hset_struct_point P (pr2 Y) =
 hset_struct_point P (pr2 X),, y)
⨿ (product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
     (pr2 Y) (x,, hset_struct_point P (pr2 Y))
   × product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
       (pr2 Y) (hset_struct_point P (pr2 X),, y))

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y: category_of_hset_struct P
y: pr1 Y
x: pr1 X
(x,, y = x,, y)
⨿ (product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
     (pr2 Y) (x,, y)
   × product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
       (pr2 Y) (x,, y))
 exact (inl (idpath _)).

X, Y: category_of_hset_struct P
y: pr1 Y
x: pr1 X
(hset_struct_point P (pr2 X) =

⨿ (y = hset_struct_point (pr12 P) (pr2 Y))
 exact (inl (idpath _)).
    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
pentagon_identity
  (monoidal_associatordata smash_product_monoidal_data)
 
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
W, X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
  smash_product_monoidal_data Z
  (bifunctor_on_objects smash_product_monoidal_data
     (bifunctor_on_objects smash_product_monoidal_data
        W X) Y)
  (bifunctor_on_objects smash_product_monoidal_data W

       X

    (monoidal_associatordata

            smash_product_monoidal_data W X) Y)
      (bifunctor_on_objects
         smash_product_monoidal_data W
         (bifunctor_on_objects
            smash_product_monoidal_data X Y))
      (monoidal_associatordata
         smash_product_monoidal_data W X Y)
    · monoidal_associatordata
        smash_product_monoidal_data W
        (bifunctor_on_objects
           smash_product_monoidal_data X Y) Z
    · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
        smash_product_monoidal_data W
        (bifunctor_on_objects
           smash_product_monoidal_data
           (bifunctor_on_objects
              smash_product_monoidal_data X Y) Z)
        (bifunctor_on_objects
           smash_product_monoidal_data X
           (bifunctor_on_objects
              smash_product_monoidal_data Y Z))
        (monoidal_associatordata
           smash_product_monoidal_data X Y Z))
   (setquotpr
      (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
         (pr2
            (bifunctor_on_objects
               smash_product_monoidal_data
               (bifunctor_on_objects
                  smash_product_monoidal_data W X) Y))
         (pr2 Z)) (c,, z)) =
 pr1
   (monoidal_associatordata
      smash_product_monoidal_data
      (bifunctor_on_objects
         smash_product_monoidal_data W X) Y Z
    · monoidal_associatordata
        smash_product_monoidal_data W X
        (bifunctor_on_objects
           smash_product_monoidal_data Y Z))
   (setquotpr
      (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
         (pr2
            (bifunctor_on_objects
               smash_product_monoidal_data
               (bifunctor_on_objects
                  smash_product_monoidal_data W X) Y))
         (pr2 Z)) (c,, z)))
  (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
        (pr2
           (bifunctor_on_objects
              smash_product_monoidal_data W X))
        (pr2 Y)) x)

         smash_product_monoidal_data Z
         (bifunctor_on_objects
            smash_product_monoidal_data
            (bifunctor_on_objects
               smash_product_monoidal_data W X) Y)
         (bifunctor_on_objects
            smash_product_monoidal_data W
            (bifunctor_on_objects
               smash_product_monoidal_data X Y))
         (monoidal_associatordata
            smash_product_monoidal_data W X Y)
       · monoidal_associatordata
           smash_product_monoidal_data W
           (bifunctor_on_objects
              smash_product_monoidal_data X Y) Z
       · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
           smash_product_monoidal_data W
           (bifunctor_on_objects
              smash_product_monoidal_data
              (bifunctor_on_objects
                 smash_product_monoidal_data X Y) Z)
           (bifunctor_on_objects
              smash_product_monoidal_data X
              (bifunctor_on_objects
                 smash_product_monoidal_data Y Z))
           (monoidal_associatordata
              smash_product_monoidal_data X Y Z))
      (setquotpr
         (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
            (pr2
               (bifunctor_on_objects
                  smash_product_monoidal_data
                  (bifunctor_on_objects
                     smash_product_monoidal_data W X)
                  Y)) (pr2 Z))
         (setquotpr
            (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
               (pr2
                  (bifunctor_on_objects
                     smash_product_monoidal_data W X))
               (pr2 Y)) (c,, y),, z)) =
    pr1
      (monoidal_associatordata
         smash_product_monoidal_data
         (bifunctor_on_objects
            smash_product_monoidal_data W X) Y Z
       · monoidal_associatordata
           smash_product_monoidal_data W X
           (bifunctor_on_objects
              smash_product_monoidal_data Y Z))
      (setquotpr
         (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
            (pr2
               (bifunctor_on_objects
                  smash_product_monoidal_data
                  (bifunctor_on_objects
                     smash_product_monoidal_data W X)
                  Y)) (pr2 Z))
         (setquotpr
            (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
               (pr2
                  (bifunctor_on_objects
                     smash_product_monoidal_data W X))
               (pr2 Y)) (c,, y),, z))) x)

z: pr1 Z
y: pr1 Y
x: setquot

     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 W) (pr2 X)))
isaprop
  ((λ c : setquot
            (pr1
               (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 W)
                  (pr2 X))),
    pr1
      (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
         smash_product_monoidal_data Z
