            smash_product_monoidal_data
            (bifunctor_on_objects
               smash_product_monoidal_data W X) Y)
         (bifunctor_on_objects
            smash_product_monoidal_data W
            (bifunctor_on_objects
               smash_product_monoidal_data X Y))
         (monoidal_associatordata
            smash_product_monoidal_data W X Y)
       · monoidal_associatordata
           smash_product_monoidal_data W
           (bifunctor_on_objects
              smash_product_monoidal_data X Y) Z
       · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
           smash_product_monoidal_data W
           (bifunctor_on_objects
              smash_product_monoidal_data
              (bifunctor_on_objects
                 smash_product_monoidal_data X Y) Z)
           (bifunctor_on_objects
              smash_product_monoidal_data X
              (bifunctor_on_objects
                 smash_product_monoidal_data Y Z))
           (monoidal_associatordata
              smash_product_monoidal_data X Y Z))
      (setquotpr
         (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
            (pr2
               (bifunctor_on_objects
                  smash_product_monoidal_data
                  (bifunctor_on_objects
                     smash_product_monoidal_data W X)
                  Y)) (pr2 Z))
         (setquotpr
            (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
               (pr2
                  (bifunctor_on_objects
                     smash_product_monoidal_data W X))
               (pr2 Y)) (c,, y),, z)) =
    pr1
      (monoidal_associatordata
         smash_product_monoidal_data
         (bifunctor_on_objects
            smash_product_monoidal_data W X) Y Z
       · monoidal_associatordata
           smash_product_monoidal_data W X
           (bifunctor_on_objects
              smash_product_monoidal_data Y Z))
      (setquotpr
         (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
            (pr2
               (bifunctor_on_objects
                  smash_product_monoidal_data
                  (bifunctor_on_objects
                     smash_product_monoidal_data W X)
                  Y)) (pr2 Z))
         (setquotpr
            (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
               (pr2
                  (bifunctor_on_objects
                     smash_product_monoidal_data W X))
               (pr2 Y)) (c,, y),, z))) x)

        apply setproperty.
      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
W, X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
z: pr1 Z
y: pr1 Y
∏ x : pr1 W × pr1 X,
(λ c : setquot
         (pr1
            (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 W)
               (pr2 X))),
 pr1
   (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
      smash_product_monoidal_data Z
      (bifunctor_on_objects
         smash_product_monoidal_data
         (bifunctor_on_objects
            smash_product_monoidal_data W X) Y)
      (bifunctor_on_objects
         smash_product_monoidal_data W
         (bifunctor_on_objects
            smash_product_monoidal_data X Y))
      (monoidal_associatordata
         smash_product_monoidal_data W X Y)
    · monoidal_associatordata
        smash_product_monoidal_data W
        (bifunctor_on_objects
           smash_product_monoidal_data X Y) Z
    · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
        smash_product_monoidal_data W
        (bifunctor_on_objects
           smash_product_monoidal_data
           (bifunctor_on_objects
              smash_product_monoidal_data X Y) Z)
        (bifunctor_on_objects
           smash_product_monoidal_data X
           (bifunctor_on_objects
              smash_product_monoidal_data Y Z))
        (monoidal_associatordata
           smash_product_monoidal_data X Y Z))
   (setquotpr
      (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
         (pr2
            (bifunctor_on_objects
               smash_product_monoidal_data
               (bifunctor_on_objects
                  smash_product_monoidal_data W X) Y))
         (pr2 Z))
      (setquotpr
         (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
            (pr2
               (bifunctor_on_objects
                  smash_product_monoidal_data W X))
            (pr2 Y)) (c,, y),, z)) =
 pr1
   (monoidal_associatordata
      smash_product_monoidal_data
      (bifunctor_on_objects
         smash_product_monoidal_data W X) Y Z
    · monoidal_associatordata
        smash_product_monoidal_data W X
        (bifunctor_on_objects
           smash_product_monoidal_data Y Z))
   (setquotpr
      (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
         (pr2
            (bifunctor_on_objects
               smash_product_monoidal_data
               (bifunctor_on_objects
                  smash_product_monoidal_data W X) Y))
         (pr2 Z))
      (setquotpr
         (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
            (pr2
               (bifunctor_on_objects
                  smash_product_monoidal_data W X))
            (pr2 Y)) (c,, y),, z)))
  (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 W) (pr2 X)) x)

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
W, X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
z: pr1 Z
y: pr1 Y
wx: pr1 W × pr1 X
(λ c : setquot
         (pr1
            (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 W)
               (pr2 X))),
 pr1
   (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
      smash_product_monoidal_data Z
      (bifunctor_on_objects
         smash_product_monoidal_data
         (bifunctor_on_objects
            smash_product_monoidal_data W X) Y)
      (bifunctor_on_objects
         smash_product_monoidal_data W
         (bifunctor_on_objects
            smash_product_monoidal_data X Y))
      (monoidal_associatordata
         smash_product_monoidal_data W X Y)
    · monoidal_associatordata
        smash_product_monoidal_data W
        (bifunctor_on_objects
           smash_product_monoidal_data X Y) Z
    · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
        smash_product_monoidal_data W
        (bifunctor_on_objects
           smash_product_monoidal_data
           (bifunctor_on_objects
              smash_product_monoidal_data X Y) Z)
        (bifunctor_on_objects
           smash_product_monoidal_data X
           (bifunctor_on_objects
              smash_product_monoidal_data Y Z))
        (monoidal_associatordata
           smash_product_monoidal_data X Y Z))
   (setquotpr
      (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
         (pr2
            (bifunctor_on_objects
               smash_product_monoidal_data
               (bifunctor_on_objects
                  smash_product_monoidal_data W X) Y))
         (pr2 Z))
      (setquotpr
         (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
            (pr2
               (bifunctor_on_objects
                  smash_product_monoidal_data W X))
            (pr2 Y)) (c,, y),, z)) =
 pr1
   (monoidal_associatordata
      smash_product_monoidal_data
      (bifunctor_on_objects
         smash_product_monoidal_data W X) Y Z
    · monoidal_associatordata
        smash_product_monoidal_data W X
        (bifunctor_on_objects
           smash_product_monoidal_data Y Z))
   (setquotpr
      (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
         (pr2
            (bifunctor_on_objects
               smash_product_monoidal_data
               (bifunctor_on_objects
                  smash_product_monoidal_data W X) Y))
         (pr2 Z))
      (setquotpr
         (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
            (pr2
               (bifunctor_on_objects
                  smash_product_monoidal_data W X))
            (pr2 Y)) (c,, y),, z)))
  (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 W) (pr2 X)) wx)

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
W, X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
z: pr1 Z
y: pr1 Y
w: pr1 W
x: pr1 X
pr1
  (rightwhiskering_on_morphisms
     smash_product_monoidal_data Z
     (bifunctor_on_objects smash_product_monoidal_data
        (bifunctor_on_objects
           smash_product_monoidal_data W X) Y)
     (bifunctor_on_objects smash_product_monoidal_data
        W
        (bifunctor_on_objects
           smash_product_monoidal_data X Y))
     (monoidal_associatordata
        smash_product_monoidal_data W X Y)
   · monoidal_associatordata
       smash_product_monoidal_data W
       (bifunctor_on_objects
          smash_product_monoidal_data X Y) Z
   · leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
       smash_product_monoidal_data W
       (bifunctor_on_objects
          smash_product_monoidal_data
          (bifunctor_on_objects
             smash_product_monoidal_data X Y) Z)
       (bifunctor_on_objects
          smash_product_monoidal_data X
          (bifunctor_on_objects
             smash_product_monoidal_data Y Z))
       (monoidal_associatordata
          smash_product_monoidal_data X Y Z))
  (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
        (pr2
           (bifunctor_on_objects
              smash_product_monoidal_data
              (bifunctor_on_objects
                 smash_product_monoidal_data W X) Y))
        (pr2 Z))
     (setquotpr
        (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
           (pr2
              (bifunctor_on_objects
                 smash_product_monoidal_data W X))
           (pr2 Y))
        (setquotpr
           (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 W)
              (pr2 X)) (w,, x),, y),, z)) =
pr1
  (monoidal_associatordata smash_product_monoidal_data
     (bifunctor_on_objects smash_product_monoidal_data
        W X) Y Z
   · monoidal_associatordata
       smash_product_monoidal_data W X
       (bifunctor_on_objects
          smash_product_monoidal_data Y Z))
  (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
        (pr2
           (bifunctor_on_objects
              smash_product_monoidal_data
              (bifunctor_on_objects
                 smash_product_monoidal_data W X) Y))
        (pr2 Z))
     (setquotpr
        (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
           (pr2
              (bifunctor_on_objects
                 smash_product_monoidal_data W X))
           (pr2 Y))
        (setquotpr
           (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 W)
              (pr2 X)) (w,, x),, y),, z))

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
W, X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
z: pr1 Z
y: pr1 Y
w: pr1 W
x: pr1 X
ishinh_UU
  ((w,,
    setquotpr
      (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
         ((pr122 P) (pr1 Y) (pr1 Z) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z)))
      (x,,
       setquotpr
         (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z))
         (y,, z)) =
    w,,
    setquotpr
      (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
         ((pr122 P) (pr1 Y) (pr1 Z) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z)))
      (x,,
       setquotpr
         (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z))
         (y,, z)))
   ⨿ (product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
        (pr2 W)
        ((pr122 P) (pr1 X)
           (setquotinset
              (smash_hrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y)
                 (pr2 Z))) (pr2 X)
           ((pr122 P) (pr1 Y) (pr1 Z) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z)))
        (w,,
         setquotpr
           (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
              ((pr122 P) (pr1 Y) (pr1 Z) (pr2 Y)
                 (pr2 Z)))
           (x,,
            setquotpr
              (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y)
                 (pr2 Z)) (y,, z)))
      × product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
          (pr2 W)
          ((pr122 P) (pr1 X)
             (setquotinset
                (smash_hrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y)
                   (pr2 Z))) (pr2 X)
             ((pr122 P) (pr1 Y) (pr1 Z) (pr2 Y)
                (pr2 Z)))
          (w,,
           setquotpr
             (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
                ((pr122 P) (pr1 Y) (pr1 Z) (pr2 Y)
                   (pr2 Z)))
             (x,,
              setquotpr
                (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y)
                   (pr2 Z)) (y,, z)))))

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
W, X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
z: pr1 Z
y: pr1 Y
w: pr1 W
x: pr1 X
(w,,
 setquotpr
   (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
      ((pr122 P) (pr1 Y) (pr1 Z) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z)))
   (x,,
    setquotpr
      (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z))
      (y,, z)) =
 w,,
 setquotpr
   (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
      ((pr122 P) (pr1 Y) (pr1 Z) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z)))
   (x,,
    setquotpr
      (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z))
      (y,, z)))
⨿ (product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 W)
     ((pr122 P) (pr1 X)
        (setquotinset
           (smash_hrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y)
              (pr2 Z))) (pr2 X)
        ((pr122 P) (pr1 Y) (pr1 Z) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z)))
     (w,,
      setquotpr
        (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
           ((pr122 P) (pr1 Y) (pr1 Z) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z)))
        (x,,
         setquotpr
           (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y)
              (pr2 Z)) (y,, z)))
   × product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 W)
       ((pr122 P) (pr1 X)
          (setquotinset
             (smash_hrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y)
                (pr2 Z))) (pr2 X)
          ((pr122 P) (pr1 Y) (pr1 Z) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z)))
       (w,,
        setquotpr
          (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
             ((pr122 P) (pr1 Y) (pr1 Z) (pr2 Y)
                (pr2 Z)))
          (x,,
           setquotpr
             (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y)
                (pr2 Z)) (y,, z))))

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
W, X, Y, Z: category_of_hset_struct P
z: pr1 Z
y: pr1 Y
w: pr1 W
x: pr1 X
w,,
setquotpr
  (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
     ((pr122 P) (pr1 Y) (pr1 Z) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z)))
  (x,,
   setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z))
     (y,, z)) =
w,,
setquotpr
  (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
     ((pr122 P) (pr1 Y) (pr1 Z) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z)))
  (x,,
   setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y) (pr2 Z))
     (y,, z))

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

  Definition smash_product_monoidal_cat
    : monoidal_cat
    := category_of_hset_struct P
       ,,
       smash_product_monoidal_data
       ,,
       smash_product_monoidal_laws.

  (**
   6. It is symmetric
   *)
  
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
sym_mon_cat_laws_tensored smash_product_monoidal_cat
  smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding

  
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
sym_mon_cat_laws_tensored smash_product_monoidal_cat
  smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding

    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
∏ x y : smash_product_monoidal_cat,
smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding x y
· smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding y x =
identity (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt x y)
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : smash_product_monoidal_cat)
(f : smash_product_monoidal_cat ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : smash_product_monoidal_cat ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
monoidal_cat_tensor_mor f g
· smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding x₂ y₂ =
smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding x₁ y₁
· monoidal_cat_tensor_mor g f
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
∏ x y z : smash_product_monoidal_cat,
mon_lassociator x y z
· smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding x
    (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt y z)
· mon_lassociator y z x =
monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
  (smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding x y)
  (identity z) · mon_lassociator y x z
· monoidal_cat_tensor_mor (identity y)
    (smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding x z)

    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
∏ x y : smash_product_monoidal_cat,
smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding x y
· smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding y x =
identity (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt x y)
 
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y: smash_product_monoidal_cat
smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X Y
· smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding Y X =
identity (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt X Y)

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y: smash_product_monoidal_cat
∏ x : pr11 (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt X Y),
pr1
  (smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X Y
   · smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding Y X) x =
pr1 (identity (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt X Y)) x

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y: smash_product_monoidal_cat
∏
x : setquot
      (pr1
         (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))),
isaprop
  ((λ c : setquot
            (pr1
               (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
                  (pr2 Y))),
    pr1
      (smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X Y
       · smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding Y X) c =
    pr1 (identity (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt X Y)) c) x)
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y: smash_product_monoidal_cat
∏ x : pr1 X × pr1 Y,
(λ c : setquot
         (pr1
            (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
               (pr2 Y))),
 pr1
   (smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X Y
    · smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding Y X) c =
 pr1 (identity (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt X Y)) c)
  (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y)) x)

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y: smash_product_monoidal_cat
∏
x : setquot
      (pr1
         (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))),
isaprop
  ((λ c : setquot
            (pr1
               (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
                  (pr2 Y))),
    pr1
      (smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X Y
       · smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding Y X) c =
    pr1 (identity (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt X Y)) c) x)

        
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y: smash_product_monoidal_cat
x: setquot
  (pr1
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y)))
isaprop
  ((λ c : setquot
            (pr1
               (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
                  (pr2 Y))),
    pr1
      (smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X Y
       · smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding Y X) c =
    pr1 (identity (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt X Y)) c) x)

        apply setproperty.
      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y: smash_product_monoidal_cat
∏ x : pr1 X × pr1 Y,
(λ c : setquot
         (pr1
            (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
               (pr2 Y))),
 pr1
   (smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X Y
    · smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding Y X) c =
 pr1 (identity (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt X Y)) c)
  (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y)) x)

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y: smash_product_monoidal_cat
xy: pr1 X × pr1 Y
(λ c : setquot
         (pr1
            (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
               (pr2 Y))),
 pr1
   (smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X Y
    · smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding Y X) c =
 pr1 (identity (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt X Y)) c)
  (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y)) xy)

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y: smash_product_monoidal_cat
x: pr1 X
y: pr1 Y
pr1
  (smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X Y
   · smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding Y X)
  (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))
     (x,, y)) =
pr1 (identity (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt X Y))
  (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))
     (x,, y))

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y: smash_product_monoidal_cat
x: pr1 X
y: pr1 Y
ishinh_UU
  ((x,, y = x,, y)
   ⨿ (product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
        (pr2 X) (pr2 Y) (x,, y)
      × product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
          (pr2 X) (pr2 Y) (x,, y)))

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y: smash_product_monoidal_cat
x: pr1 X
y: pr1 Y
(x,, y = x,, y)
⨿ (product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
     (pr2 Y) (x,, y)
   × product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
       (pr2 Y) (x,, y))

      exact (inl (idpath _)).
    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : smash_product_monoidal_cat)
(f : smash_product_monoidal_cat ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : smash_product_monoidal_cat ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
monoidal_cat_tensor_mor f g
· smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding x₂ y₂ =
smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding x₁ y₁
· monoidal_cat_tensor_mor g f
 
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂: smash_product_monoidal_cat
f: smash_product_monoidal_cat ⟦ X₁, X₂ ⟧
g: smash_product_monoidal_cat ⟦ Y₁, Y₂ ⟧
monoidal_cat_tensor_mor f g
· smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X₂ Y₂ =
smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X₁ Y₁
· monoidal_cat_tensor_mor g f

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂: smash_product_monoidal_cat
f: smash_product_monoidal_cat ⟦ X₁, X₂ ⟧
g: smash_product_monoidal_cat ⟦ Y₁, Y₂ ⟧
∏ x : pr11 (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt X₁ Y₁),
pr1
  (monoidal_cat_tensor_mor f g
   · smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X₂ Y₂) x =
pr1
  (smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X₁ Y₁
   · monoidal_cat_tensor_mor g f) x

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂: smash_product_monoidal_cat
f: smash_product_monoidal_cat ⟦ X₁, X₂ ⟧
g: smash_product_monoidal_cat ⟦ Y₁, Y₂ ⟧
∏
x : setquot
      (pr1
         (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X₁)
            (pr2 Y₁))),
isaprop
  ((λ c : setquot
            (pr1
               (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X₁)
                  (pr2 Y₁))),
    pr1
      (monoidal_cat_tensor_mor f g
       · smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X₂ Y₂) c =
    pr1
      (smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X₁ Y₁
       · monoidal_cat_tensor_mor g f) c) x)
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂: smash_product_monoidal_cat
f: smash_product_monoidal_cat ⟦ X₁, X₂ ⟧
g: smash_product_monoidal_cat ⟦ Y₁, Y₂ ⟧
∏ x : pr1 X₁ × pr1 Y₁,
(λ c : setquot
         (pr1
            (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X₁)
               (pr2 Y₁))),
 pr1
   (monoidal_cat_tensor_mor f g
    · smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X₂ Y₂) c =
 pr1
   (smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X₁ Y₁
    · monoidal_cat_tensor_mor g f) c)
  (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X₁) (pr2 Y₁))
     x)

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂: smash_product_monoidal_cat
f: smash_product_monoidal_cat ⟦ X₁, X₂ ⟧
g: smash_product_monoidal_cat ⟦ Y₁, Y₂ ⟧
∏
x : setquot
      (pr1
         (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X₁)
            (pr2 Y₁))),
isaprop
  ((λ c : setquot
            (pr1
               (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X₁)
                  (pr2 Y₁))),
    pr1
      (monoidal_cat_tensor_mor f g
       · smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X₂ Y₂) c =
    pr1
      (smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X₁ Y₁
       · monoidal_cat_tensor_mor g f) c) x)

        
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂: smash_product_monoidal_cat
f: smash_product_monoidal_cat ⟦ X₁, X₂ ⟧
g: smash_product_monoidal_cat ⟦ Y₁, Y₂ ⟧
x: setquot
  (pr1
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X₁)
        (pr2 Y₁)))
isaprop
  ((λ c : setquot
            (pr1
               (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X₁)
                  (pr2 Y₁))),
    pr1
      (monoidal_cat_tensor_mor f g
       · smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X₂ Y₂) c =
    pr1
      (smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X₁ Y₁
       · monoidal_cat_tensor_mor g f) c) x)

        apply setproperty.
      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂: smash_product_monoidal_cat
f: smash_product_monoidal_cat ⟦ X₁, X₂ ⟧
g: smash_product_monoidal_cat ⟦ Y₁, Y₂ ⟧
∏ x : pr1 X₁ × pr1 Y₁,
(λ c : setquot
         (pr1
            (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X₁)
               (pr2 Y₁))),
 pr1
   (monoidal_cat_tensor_mor f g
    · smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X₂ Y₂) c =
 pr1
   (smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X₁ Y₁
    · monoidal_cat_tensor_mor g f) c)
  (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X₁) (pr2 Y₁))
     x)

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂: smash_product_monoidal_cat
f: smash_product_monoidal_cat ⟦ X₁, X₂ ⟧
g: smash_product_monoidal_cat ⟦ Y₁, Y₂ ⟧
xy: pr1 X₁ × pr1 Y₁
(λ c : setquot
         (pr1
            (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X₁)
               (pr2 Y₁))),
 pr1
   (monoidal_cat_tensor_mor f g
    · smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X₂ Y₂) c =
 pr1
   (smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X₁ Y₁
    · monoidal_cat_tensor_mor g f) c)
  (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X₁) (pr2 Y₁))
     xy)

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂: smash_product_monoidal_cat
f: smash_product_monoidal_cat ⟦ X₁, X₂ ⟧
g: smash_product_monoidal_cat ⟦ Y₁, Y₂ ⟧
x: pr1 X₁
y: pr1 Y₁
pr1
  (monoidal_cat_tensor_mor f g
   · smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X₂ Y₂)
  (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X₁) (pr2 Y₁))
     (x,, y)) =
pr1
  (smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X₁ Y₁
   · monoidal_cat_tensor_mor g f)
  (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X₁) (pr2 Y₁))
     (x,, y))

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂: smash_product_monoidal_cat
f: smash_product_monoidal_cat ⟦ X₁, X₂ ⟧
g: smash_product_monoidal_cat ⟦ Y₁, Y₂ ⟧
x: pr1 X₁
y: pr1 Y₁
ishinh_UU
  ((pr1 g y,, pr1 f x = pr1 g y,, pr1 f x)
   ⨿ (product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
        (pr2 Y₂) (pr2 X₂) (pr1 g y,, pr1 f x)
      × product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
          (pr2 Y₂) (pr2 X₂) (pr1 g y,, pr1 f x)))

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X₁, X₂, Y₁, Y₂: smash_product_monoidal_cat
f: smash_product_monoidal_cat ⟦ X₁, X₂ ⟧
g: smash_product_monoidal_cat ⟦ Y₁, Y₂ ⟧
x: pr1 X₁
y: pr1 Y₁
(pr1 g y,, pr1 f x = pr1 g y,, pr1 f x)
⨿ (product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y₂)
     (pr2 X₂) (pr1 g y,, pr1 f x)
   × product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
       (pr2 Y₂) (pr2 X₂) (pr1 g y,, pr1 f x))

      exact (inl (idpath _)).
    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
∏ x y z : smash_product_monoidal_cat,
mon_lassociator x y z
· smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding x
    (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt y z)
· mon_lassociator y z x =
monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
  (smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding x y)
  (identity z) · mon_lassociator y x z
· monoidal_cat_tensor_mor (identity y)
    (smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding x z)
 
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: smash_product_monoidal_cat
mon_lassociator X Y Z
· smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X
    (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt Y Z)
· mon_lassociator Y Z X =
monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
  (smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X Y)
  (identity Z) · mon_lassociator Y X Z
· monoidal_cat_tensor_mor (identity Y)
    (smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X Z)

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: smash_product_monoidal_cat
∏
x : pr11 (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt
            (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt X Y) Z),
pr1
  (mon_lassociator X Y Z
   · smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X
       (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt Y Z)
   · mon_lassociator Y Z X) x =
pr1
  (monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
     (smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X Y)
     (identity Z) · mon_lassociator Y X Z
   · monoidal_cat_tensor_mor (identity Y)
       (smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X Z)) x

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: smash_product_monoidal_cat
∏
x : setquot
      (pr1
         (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
            (pr2 (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt X Y)) (pr2 Z))),
isaprop
  ((λ c : setquot
            (pr1
               (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                  (pr2 (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt X Y))
                  (pr2 Z))),
    pr1
      (mon_lassociator X Y Z
       · smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X
           (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt Y Z)
       · mon_lassociator Y Z X) c =
    pr1
      (monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
         (smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X Y)
         (identity Z) · mon_lassociator Y X Z
       · monoidal_cat_tensor_mor (identity Y)
           (smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X Z))
      c) x)
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: smash_product_monoidal_cat
∏ x : pr1 (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt X Y) × pr1 Z,
(λ c : setquot
         (pr1
            (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
               (pr2 (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt X Y))
               (pr2 Z))),
 pr1
   (mon_lassociator X Y Z
    · smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X
        (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt Y Z)
    · mon_lassociator Y Z X) c =
 pr1
   (monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
      (smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X Y)
      (identity Z) · mon_lassociator Y X Z
    · monoidal_cat_tensor_mor (identity Y)
        (smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X Z)) c)
  (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
        (pr2 (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt X Y)) (pr2 Z)) x)

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: smash_product_monoidal_cat
∏
x : setquot
      (pr1
         (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
            (pr2 (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt X Y)) (pr2 Z))),
isaprop
  ((λ c : setquot
            (pr1
               (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                  (pr2 (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt X Y))
                  (pr2 Z))),
    pr1
      (mon_lassociator X Y Z
       · smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X
           (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt Y Z)
       · mon_lassociator Y Z X) c =
    pr1
      (monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
         (smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X Y)
         (identity Z) · mon_lassociator Y X Z
       · monoidal_cat_tensor_mor (identity Y)
           (smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X Z))
      c) x)

        
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: smash_product_monoidal_cat
x: setquot
  (pr1
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
        (pr2 (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt X Y)) (pr2 Z)))
isaprop
  ((λ c : setquot
            (pr1
               (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
                  (pr2 (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt X Y))
                  (pr2 Z))),
    pr1
      (mon_lassociator X Y Z
       · smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X
           (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt Y Z)
       · mon_lassociator Y Z X) c =
    pr1
      (monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
         (smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X Y)
         (identity Z) · mon_lassociator Y X Z
       · monoidal_cat_tensor_mor (identity Y)
           (smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X Z))
      c) x)

        apply setproperty.
      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: smash_product_monoidal_cat
∏ x : pr1 (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt X Y) × pr1 Z,
(λ c : setquot

            (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
               (pr2 (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt X Y))
               (pr2 Z))),

    · smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X

    · monoidal_cat_tensor_mor (identity Y)

        (pr2 (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt X Y)) (pr2 Z)) x)

        (pr2 (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt X Y)) (pr2 Z))
     xyz)

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed

z: pr1 Z
pr1
  (mon_lassociator X Y Z
   · smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X
       (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt Y Z)
   · mon_lassociator Y Z X)
  (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)

        (pr2 (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt X Y)) (pr2 Z))
     (xy,, z))

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: smash_product_monoidal_cat
z: pr1 Z
∏ xy : pr1 (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt X Y),
pr1
  (mon_lassociator X Y Z
   · smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X
       (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt Y Z)
   · mon_lassociator Y Z X)
  (setquotpr

   · monoidal_cat_tensor_mor (identity Y)
       (smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X Z))
  (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
        (pr2 (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt X Y)) (pr2 Z))
     (xy,, z))

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: smash_product_monoidal_cat
z: pr1 Z
∏
x : setquot
      (pr1
         (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))),
isaprop
  ((λ c : setquot
            (pr1
               (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
                  (pr2 Y))),
    pr1
      (mon_lassociator X Y Z
       · smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X
           (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt Y Z)
       · mon_lassociator Y Z X)
      (setquotpr
         (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
            (pr2 (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt X Y)) (pr2 Z))
         (c,, z)) =
    pr1
      (monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
         (smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X Y)
         (identity Z) · mon_lassociator Y X Z
       · monoidal_cat_tensor_mor (identity Y)
           (smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X Z))
      (setquotpr
         (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
            (pr2 (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt X Y)) (pr2 Z))
         (c,, z))) x)
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: smash_product_monoidal_cat
z: pr1 Z
∏ x : pr1 X × pr1 Y,
(λ c : setquot
         (pr1
            (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
               (pr2 Y))),
 pr1
   (mon_lassociator X Y Z
    · smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X
        (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt Y Z)
    · mon_lassociator Y Z X)
   (setquotpr
      (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
         (pr2 (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt X Y)) (pr2 Z))
      (c,, z)) =
 pr1
   (monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
      (smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X Y)
      (identity Z) · mon_lassociator Y X Z
    · monoidal_cat_tensor_mor (identity Y)
        (smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X Z))
   (setquotpr
      (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
         (pr2 (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt X Y)) (pr2 Z))
      (c,, z)))
  (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y)) x)

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: smash_product_monoidal_cat
z: pr1 Z
∏
x : setquot
      (pr1
         (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))),
isaprop
  ((λ c : setquot
            (pr1
               (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
                  (pr2 Y))),
    pr1
      (mon_lassociator X Y Z
       · smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X
           (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt Y Z)
       · mon_lassociator Y Z X)
      (setquotpr
         (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
            (pr2 (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt X Y)) (pr2 Z))
         (c,, z)) =
    pr1
      (monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
         (smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X Y)
         (identity Z) · mon_lassociator Y X Z
       · monoidal_cat_tensor_mor (identity Y)
           (smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X Z))
      (setquotpr
         (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
            (pr2 (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt X Y)) (pr2 Z))
         (c,, z))) x)

        
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: smash_product_monoidal_cat
z: pr1 Z
x: setquot
  (pr1
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y)))
isaprop
  ((λ c : setquot
            (pr1
               (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
                  (pr2 Y))),
    pr1
      (mon_lassociator X Y Z
       · smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X
           (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt Y Z)
       · mon_lassociator Y Z X)
      (setquotpr
         (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
            (pr2 (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt X Y)) (pr2 Z))
         (c,, z)) =
    pr1
      (monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
         (smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X Y)
         (identity Z) · mon_lassociator Y X Z
       · monoidal_cat_tensor_mor (identity Y)
           (smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X Z))
      (setquotpr
         (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
            (pr2 (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt X Y)) (pr2 Z))
         (c,, z))) x)

        apply setproperty.
      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: smash_product_monoidal_cat
z: pr1 Z
∏ x : pr1 X × pr1 Y,
(λ c : setquot
         (pr1
            (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
               (pr2 Y))),
 pr1
   (mon_lassociator X Y Z
    · smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X
        (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt Y Z)
    · mon_lassociator Y Z X)
   (setquotpr
      (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
         (pr2 (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt X Y)) (pr2 Z))
      (c,, z)) =
 pr1
   (monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
      (smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X Y)
      (identity Z) · mon_lassociator Y X Z
    · monoidal_cat_tensor_mor (identity Y)
        (smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X Z))
   (setquotpr
      (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
         (pr2 (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt X Y)) (pr2 Z))
      (c,, z)))
  (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y)) x)

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: smash_product_monoidal_cat
z: pr1 Z
xy: pr1 X × pr1 Y
(λ c : setquot
         (pr1
            (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X)
               (pr2 Y))),
 pr1
   (mon_lassociator X Y Z
    · smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X
        (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt Y Z)
    · mon_lassociator Y Z X)
   (setquotpr
      (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
         (pr2 (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt X Y)) (pr2 Z))
      (c,, z)) =
 pr1
   (monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
      (smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X Y)
      (identity Z) · mon_lassociator Y X Z
    · monoidal_cat_tensor_mor (identity Y)
        (smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X Z))
   (setquotpr
      (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
         (pr2 (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt X Y)) (pr2 Z))
      (c,, z)))
  (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y)) xy)

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: smash_product_monoidal_cat
z: pr1 Z
x: pr1 X
y: pr1 Y
pr1
  (mon_lassociator X Y Z
   · smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X
       (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt Y Z)
   · mon_lassociator Y Z X)
  (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
        (pr2 (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt X Y)) (pr2 Z))
     (setquotpr
        (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))
        (x,, y),, z)) =
pr1
  (monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
     (smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X Y)
     (identity Z) · mon_lassociator Y X Z
   · monoidal_cat_tensor_mor (identity Y)
       (smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding X Z))
  (setquotpr
     (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
        (pr2 (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt X Y)) (pr2 Z))
     (setquotpr
        (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 X) (pr2 Y))
        (x,, y),, z))

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: smash_product_monoidal_cat
z: pr1 Z
x: pr1 X
y: pr1 Y
ishinh_UU
  ((y,,
    setquotpr
      (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Z) (pr2 X))
      (z,, x) =
    y,,
    setquotpr
      (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Z) (pr2 X))
      (z,, x))
   ⨿ (product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
        (pr2 Y)
        ((pr122 P) (pr1 Z) (pr1 X) (pr2 Z) (pr2 X))
        (y,,
         setquotpr
           (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Z)
              (pr2 X)) (z,, x))
      × product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P)
          (pr2 Y)
          ((pr122 P) (pr1 Z) (pr1 X) (pr2 Z) (pr2 X))
          (y,,
           setquotpr
             (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Z)
                (pr2 X)) (z,, x))))

      
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
X, Y, Z: smash_product_monoidal_cat
z: pr1 Z
x: pr1 X
y: pr1 Y
(y,,
 setquotpr
   (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Z) (pr2 X))
   (z,, x) =
 y,,
 setquotpr
   (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Z) (pr2 X))
   (z,, x))
⨿ (product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y)
     ((pr122 P) (pr1 Z) (pr1 X) (pr2 Z) (pr2 X))
     (y,,
      setquotpr
        (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Z) (pr2 X))
        (z,, x))
   × product_point_coordinate (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Y)
       ((pr122 P) (pr1 Z) (pr1 X) (pr2 Z) (pr2 X))
       (y,,
        setquotpr
          (smash_eqrel (pr1 P) (pr12 P) (pr2 Z)
             (pr2 X)) (z,, x)))

      exact (inl (idpath _)).
  Qed.

  
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
symmetric smash_product_monoidal_cat

  
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
symmetric smash_product_monoidal_cat

    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
∏ x y : smash_product_monoidal_cat,
smash_product_monoidal_cat
⟦ monoidal_cat_tensor_pt x y,
monoidal_cat_tensor_pt y x ⟧
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
sym_mon_cat_laws_tensored smash_product_monoidal_cat
  ?c

    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
∏ x y : smash_product_monoidal_cat,
smash_product_monoidal_cat
⟦ monoidal_cat_tensor_pt x y,
monoidal_cat_tensor_pt y x ⟧
 exact smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding.
    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
sym_mon_cat_laws_tensored smash_product_monoidal_cat
  smash_product_monoidal_cat_braiding
 exact smash_product_monoidal_cat_symmetric_laws.
  Defined.

  Definition smash_product_sym_monoidal_cat
    : sym_monoidal_cat
    := smash_product_monoidal_cat
       ,,
       smash_product_monoidal_cat_symmetric.

  (**
   7. It is closed
   *)
  
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
sym_mon_closed_cat

  
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
sym_mon_closed_cat

    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
sym_monoidal_cat
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
?V → ?V → ?V
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
∏ x y : ?V,
?V ⟦ monoidal_cat_tensor_pt (?HomV x y) x, y ⟧
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
∏ x y z : ?V,
?V ⟦ monoidal_cat_tensor_pt z x, y ⟧
→ ?V ⟦ z, ?HomV x y ⟧
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
∏ (x y z : ?V)
(f : ?V ⟦ monoidal_cat_tensor_pt z x, y ⟧),
monoidal_cat_tensor_mor (?lam x y z f) (identity x)
· ?eval x y = f
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
∏ (x y z : ?V) (g : ?V ⟦ z, ?HomV x y ⟧),
g =
?lam x y z
  (monoidal_cat_tensor_mor g (identity x) · ?eval x y)

    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
sym_monoidal_cat
 exact smash_product_sym_monoidal_cat.
    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
smash_product_sym_monoidal_cat
→ smash_product_sym_monoidal_cat
  → smash_product_sym_monoidal_cat
 exact (λ X Y, X -->* Y).
    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
∏ x y : smash_product_sym_monoidal_cat,
smash_product_sym_monoidal_cat
⟦ monoidal_cat_tensor_pt
    ((λ X Y : smash_product_sym_monoidal_cat, X -->* Y)
       x y) x, y ⟧
 exact (λ PX PY, hset_struct_with_smash_closed_eval PX PY).
    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
∏ x y z : smash_product_sym_monoidal_cat,
smash_product_sym_monoidal_cat
⟦ monoidal_cat_tensor_pt z x, y ⟧
→ smash_product_sym_monoidal_cat ⟦ z,
  (λ X Y : smash_product_sym_monoidal_cat, X -->* Y) x
    y ⟧
 exact (λ X Y Z f, hset_struct_smash_closed_uncurry f).
    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
∏ (x y z : smash_product_sym_monoidal_cat)
(f : smash_product_sym_monoidal_cat
     ⟦ monoidal_cat_tensor_pt z x, y ⟧),
monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
  ((λ (X Y Z : smash_product_sym_monoidal_cat)
    (f0 : smash_product_sym_monoidal_cat
          ⟦ monoidal_cat_tensor_pt Z X, Y ⟧),
    hset_struct_smash_closed_uncurry f0) x y z f)
  (identity x)
· (λ PX PY : smash_product_sym_monoidal_cat,
   hset_struct_with_smash_closed_eval PX PY) x y = f
 abstract
        (intros X Y Z f ;
         use eq_mor_hset_struct ;
         use setquotunivprop' ; [ intro ; apply setproperty | ] ;
         intros zx ;
         induction zx as [ z x ] ;
         cbn ;
         apply idpath).
    
P: hset_struct_with_smash_closed
∏ (x y z : smash_product_sym_monoidal_cat)
(g : smash_product_sym_monoidal_cat ⟦ z,
     (λ X Y : smash_product_sym_monoidal_cat, X -->* Y)
       x y ⟧),
g =
(λ (X Y Z : smash_product_sym_monoidal_cat)
 (f : smash_product_sym_monoidal_cat
      ⟦ monoidal_cat_tensor_pt Z X, Y ⟧),
 hset_struct_smash_closed_uncurry f) x y z
  (monoidal_cat_tensor_mor g (identity x)
   · (λ PX PY : smash_product_sym_monoidal_cat,
      hset_struct_with_smash_closed_eval PX PY) x y)
 abstract
        (intros X Y Z f ;
         use eq_mor_hset_struct ;
         intros z ;
         use eq_mor_hset_struct ;
         intros x ;
         cbn ;
         apply idpath).
  Defined.
End StructureSmashProduct.
